instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shyamrajprasad dataweave fun customColumn (mapping/transformation)
Write a DataWeave transformation for p gisResponseValiation (mapping/transformation, filtering)
Create a Mule 4 flow named 'GetMovies' using DataWeave Transform, Database Insert, Database Select
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:validation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/validation" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
	xmlns:db="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db"
	xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db/current/mule-db.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/validation http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/validation/current/mule-validation.xsd">
	<flow name="GetMovies" doc:id="4c5336f2-42e8-4240-8859-b812202afab2" >
		<db:select doc:name="Select" doc:id="52487288-8e0f-4a7a-989b-934158795883" config-ref="Database_Config">
			<db:sql ><![CDATA[select * from movie_table where m_available > 0]]></db:sql>
		</db:select>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message" doc:id="dc387884-a638-4198-b2d8-8453875be35f" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<logger level="INFO" doc:name="Logger" doc:id="aeeef8e6-fbca-469e-9b12-a620e911b1bc" />
	</flow>
	<flow name="BookTickets" doc:id="2df5fe63-8e10-4039-90b9-ff29a1be9856">
		<set-variable value="#[{

	no_tickets: attributes.queryParams.no_tickets,

	m_id: attributes.uriParams.m_id

}]" doc:name="orderDetails" doc:id="533f0ef3-e26f-40ba-b415-12cae574ef85" variableName="no_tickets"/>
		<db:select doc:name="Select" doc:id="4971a805-37b1-4e0f-9c8a-ac8ca62b93fe" config-ref="Database_Config">
			<db:sql ><![CDATA[select m_available from movie_table where m_id = :m_id]]></db:sql>
			<db:input-parameters ><![CDATA[#[{
	'm_id' : vars.no_tickets.m_id
}]]]></db:input-parameters>
		</db:select>
		<validation:is-true doc:name="Is true" doc:id="372d4540-7235-4bba-8aaa-01538b3a8314" expression="#[((payload[0].m_available as Number)  -  (vars.no_tickets.no_tickets   as Number ) )>= 0]" message="Error in true"/>
		<db:insert doc:name="Insert" doc:id="d130c5bf-fbc5-4371-a9d3-e1a284ea2577" config-ref="Database_Config">
			<db:sql><![CDATA[insert into order_table (m_id,no_tickets,price) values(:m_id,:no_tickets,:price)]]></db:sql>
			<db:input-parameters><![CDATA[#[{
   'm_id': vars.no_tickets.'m_id' as  Number,
   'no_tickets': vars.no_tickets.no_tickets  as Number,
   'price': if(vars.no_tickets.no_tickets as  Number <= 5) vars.no_tickets.no_tickets as Number * 100 else
   if(vars.no_tickets.no_tickets as  Number <= 10) vars.no_tickets.no_tickets as Number * (90) else 
   vars.no_tickets.no_tickets  as Number  * (80)
}]]]></db:input-parameters>
		</db:insert>
		<db:update doc:name="Update" doc:id="b7e47364-3530-4c8a-838d-af01f73ca8fd" config-ref="Database_Config">
			<db:sql ><![CDATA[update movie_table set m_available = m_available - :no_tickets where m_id  = :m_id]]></db:sql>
			<db:input-parameters ><![CDATA[#[{
'm_id': vars.no_tickets.'m_id' as  Number,
'no_tickets': vars.no_tickets.no_tickets  as Number
	
}]]]></db:input-parameters>
		</db:update>
		<db:select doc:name="Select" doc:id="ae41728a-7c54-40ad-acef-645936178ab7" config-ref="Database_Config">
			<db:sql ><![CDATA[select * from order_table WHERE o_id = (SELECT MAX(o_id) FROM order_table)]]></db:sql>
		</db:select>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message" doc:id="7ce43468-0d12-4b50-b1a5-4ea2515d890d">
			<ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<error-handler >
			<on-error-continue enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Continue" doc:id="751cfa3c-a530-4f3e-8ccf-ee4ac959fc3f" type="VALIDATION:INVALID_BOOLEAN">
				<ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message" doc:id="38533b75-0ba4-4de4-b989-40a2196727b9" >
					<ee:message >
						<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
payload]]></ee:set-payload>
					</ee:message>
				</ee:transform>
				<set-payload value='#[output application/json

	---

	{

	"error": "avaible tickets is only $(payload[0].m_available) but you have ordered $(vars.no_tickets.no_tickets)"

}]' doc:name="Set Payload" doc:id="c647bf58-156b-414e-b560-4eeadd782cd7" />
			</on-error-continue>
		</error-handler>
	</flow>
</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shyamrajprasad dataweave fun csvTransformation (mapping/transformation, CSV processing)

The **SF Site Survey SAPI** (System API) provides direct Salesforce integration for retrieving Site Survey and Service Request data. It enables upstre using DataWeave Transform, HTTP Listener with API endpoint /${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd">
	<flow name="sf-sitesurvey-sapi-main">
        <http:listener path="/${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*" config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" doc:name="HTTP Listener ">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
		<ee:transform doc:name="originalPayload" doc:id="c86f4dd6-1c1a-47be-a0c9-ed2a8c916530" >
			<ee:message >
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables >
				<ee:set-variable variableName="originalPayload" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
import * from dw::core::Strings
output application/java
var path =attributes.maskedRequestPath
---
if(path as String == "/sitesurvey") (payload)
else
({
	"siteSurveyId" : substringAfterLast(path,'/')
})]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log initial request payload" doc:id="5d74c7ac-7c15-4234-95d8-7e16571afc16" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Initial Request Payload">
			<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[output application/json ---
{
    payload: (vars.originalPayload) 
}]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<apikit:router config-ref="sf-sitesurvey-sapi-config"/>
		<error-handler>
			<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="8720f1fd-dead-4ad4-be79-0276bcefc7a2" >
				<error-handler-plugin:on-error doc:name="Process Error" doc:id="ef3a8c56-577b-4432-ac67-a54d1f561b6a" config-ref="Error_Handler_Plugin_Config"/>
				<set-variable value="#[attributes.httpStatus]" doc:name="Set Http Status Code" doc:id="ab48e323-66c6-43b1-ba69-69e2f49ffaaa" variableName="httpStatus"/>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log APIkit error response" doc:id="29f6e0f3-3524-4878-a179-0b06022ba95e" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Error response from APIkit router" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR"/>
			</on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="sf-sitesurvey-sapi-console">
        <http:listener path="/${api.name}/api/${api.version}/console/*" config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:console config-ref="sf-sitesurvey-sapi-config"/>
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Console error">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\sitesurvey:application\json:sf-sitesurvey-sapi-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="get-ssv-sr-details" doc:id="ffa3d9c1-c18f-4b2b-b954-22702f098aa8" name="get-ssv-sr-details"/>
    </flow>
	<flow name="get:\sitesurvey\(id):sf-sitesurvey-sapi-config" doc:id="d1d18f8b-3206-43cd-9db7-d370875099da" >
		<flow-ref doc:name="get-sitesurvey-details" doc:id="5264b8c1-8e89-402e-9f88-a1bf7662c790" name="get-sitesurvey-details"/>
	</flow>
	<flow name="get:\health-check:sf-sitesurvey-sapi-config" doc:id="8c161c6a-5079-4630-b08d-1f95841bbf70" >
		<ee:transform doc:name="Health-Check Response" doc:id="f588ff31-39e1-444d-a88c-7c6870d24eba" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/health_check_response.dwl" />
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log Health-Check Response" doc:id="14c2e124-e43d-49ce-89ae-c1cbf4e1a0bc" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Health-Check Response" tracePoint="END" />
	</flow>
</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for p webexAlert (XML handling)
output:
%dw 2.0 import * from dw::core::Strings output application/json fun errorType(err) = if((err.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ err.errorType.identifier) == "HTTP:UNAUTHORIZED") "while authenticating to NetCracker, below are the details." else if((err.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ err.errorType.identifier) == "HTTP:NOT_FOUND") "while connecting to NetCracker, Resource not found, below are the details." else if ((err.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ err.errorType.identifier) == "HTTP:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED") "while connecting to NetCracker, Method not allowed, below are the details." else if((err.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ err.errorType.identifier) == "HTTP:CONNECTIVITY") "while connecting to NetCracker, below are the details." else if(((err.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ err.errorType.identifier) == "SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT") or ((err.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ err.errorType.identifier) == "SALESFORCE:UNAUTHORIZED")) "while authenticating to Salesforce, below are the details." else if((err.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ err.errorType.identifier) == "SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY") "while connecting to Salesforce, below are the details." else ", err didn't handled, below are the details." --- { "markdown": "ENV:" ++ upper(p('mule.env')) ++ ":ERROR:" ++ (if(error.suppressedErrors[0] != null) error.suppressedErrors[0].errorType.asString else error.errorType.asString) ++ "(" ++ upper(p('api.name')) ++ ")" ++ "

Error occurred in " ++ p('api.name') ++ " " ++ ( if (error.suppressedErrors[0] != null) errorType(error.suppressedErrors[0]) else errorType(error))++ "

Error Details:
" ++" Correlation Id = " ++ vars.correlationId ++ "
Application Name = " ++ p('api.name') ++ "
Time Stamp = " ++ now() ++ " UTC" ++ "
System Name = NetCracker
Request Payload= " ++ write(vars.originalPayload, "application/java") as String ++ "
Error Message = " ++ (if(error.suppressedErrors[0] != null) error.suppressedErrors[0].cause.localizedMessage else error.cause.localizedMessage)++ "" }

instruction: using DataWeave Transform
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation"
	xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
	xsi:schemaLocation="
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd">
	<error-handler name="api-error-handler" doc:id="99a60da9-61f7-49e9-bcc7-944a5b685927">
	<on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:BAD_REQUEST">
                <ee:transform>
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Bad request"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">400</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform>
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>

Write a DataWeave transformation: shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook number formatting
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Number Formatting
 * Category: Type Coercion
 * Difficulty: Beginner
 * Description: Format numbers as strings with specific patterns — currency
 * display, percentage formatting, zero-padding, decimal precision, and
 * thousand separators. Use when building human-readable reports, invoices,
 * or API responses that require specific numeric representations.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "price": 1299.5,
 *   "taxRate": 0.0875,
 *   "quantity": 42,
 *   "largeNumber": 1234567.89,
 *   "percentage": 0.9534,
 *   "smallDecimal": 3.1
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "currency": "1,299.50",
 * "taxPercent": "8.75%",
 * "zeroPadded": "00042",
 * "withThousands": "1,234,567.89",
 * "percentDisplay": "95.34%",
 * "twoDecimals": "3.10",
 * "noDecimals": "1300",
 * "scientific": "1.23E6"
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
    currency: payload.price as String {format: "#,##0.00"},
    taxPercent: (payload.taxRate * 100) as String {format: "0.##"} ++ "%",
    zeroPadded: payload.quantity as String {format: "00000"},
    withThousands: payload.largeNumber as String {format: "#,##0.00"},
    percentDisplay: (payload.percentage * 100) as String {format: "0.00"} ++ "%",
    twoDecimals: payload.smallDecimal as String {format: "0.00"}
}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook selective transform (filtering, aggregation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Selective Transform (Delta Processing)
 * Category: Performance & Optimization
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Transform only changed fields between two versions of a
 * record. Useful for delta/incremental sync between systems, reducing
 * API payload size and avoiding unnecessary updates.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "previous": {
 *     "id": "C1",
 *     "name": "Acme Corp",
 *     "email": "old@acme.com",
 *     "tier": "Silver"
 *   },
 *   "current": {
 *     "id": "C1",
 *     "name": "Acme Corp",
 *     "email": "new@acme.com",
 *     "tier": "Gold"
 *   }
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "id": "CUST-001",
 * "hasChanges": true,
 * "changedFields": ["email", "address", "tier", "lastModified"],
 * "delta": {
 * "email": { "from": "john@example.com", "to": "john.doe@newdomain.com" },
 * "address": { "from": { "city": "Austin", "zip": "78701" }, "to": { "city": "Dallas", "zip": "75201" } },
 * "tier": { "from": "Silver", "to": "Gold" },
 * "lastModified": { "from": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z", "to": "2026-02-18T10:30:00Z" }
 * },
 * "patchPayload": {
 * "email": "john.doe@newdomain.com",
 * "address": { "city": "Dallas", "state": "TX", "zip": "75201" },
 * "tier": "Gold"
 * }
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var prev = payload.previous
var curr = payload.current
fun isDifferent(a: Any, b: Any): Boolean = write(a, "application/json") != write(b, "application/json")
var changes = (curr pluck (value, key) -> ({ field: key as String, changed: isDifferent(prev[key as String], value), oldValue: prev[key as String], newValue: value })) filter $.changed
---
{ id: curr.id, hasChanges: !isEmpty(changes), changedFields: changes.field,
  delta: changes reduce (c, acc = {}) -> acc ++ { (c.field): { from: c.oldValue, to: c.newValue } },
  patchPayload: changes reduce (c, acc = {}) -> acc ++ { (c.field): c.newValue } }

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: v startDate m
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var today = now().day as String{format:"00"}
var reportMonth = if (today == 1) ((now() - |P2M|).month as String{format:"00"}) else ((now() - |P1M|).month as String{format:"00"})
var reportYear = now().year
var reportDay = if (payload.FiscalMonthDaySTART[0].Value__c != null and payload.FiscalMonthDaySTART[0].Value__c != "") payload.FiscalMonthDaySTART[0].Value__c else vars.fiscalMonthDayStart 
---
reportYear ++ "-" ++ reportMonth ++ "-" ++ reportDay ++ "T00:00:00.000Z"

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for p filter missing wo task records (mapping/transformation, filtering)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
vars.o2fileRecords filter !(vars.smbWOs contains $.Work_Order_Number__c) map ( {
	"Work_Order_Number__c" : $.Work_Order_Number__c,
	"External_Id__c": $.Name,
	"Name" : $.Name,
	"Source__c" : $.Source__c,
	"Subject" : "O2 Task - " ++ $.Type ,
	"Type" : $.Type,
	"Sub_Type__c" : $.Sub_Type__c,
	"Detail__c" : $.Detail__c,
	"Status" : if ($.Status == "Unable to Complete") "Closed - No Response" else if ($.Status == "Cancelled") "Cancelled" else if ($.Status == "Completed") "Completed in O2" else "Pending",
	"Priority" : if ($.Type == 'At Risk Orders') "High"  else "Normal",
	"External_Created_Date__c" : $.External_Created_Date__c as LocalDateTime {format: "MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss"} as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss"} ++ 'Z',
	"ActivityDate" : $.ActivityDate as LocalDateTime {format: "MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss"} as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss"} ++ 'Z',
	"Comment__c" : $.Comment__c
} )

	http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd

    <http:listener-config name="to-do-task-management-api-httpListenerConfig">

    <!-- Environment global property -->

    <!-- MySQL Database Configuration -->

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for Transfrom Results no Filter (mapping/transformation, filtering, XML handling)

%dw 1.0
%output application/xml skipNullOn="everywhere"
%namespace ns0 http://www.twcable.com/soa/types/GetServiceStatus/v1x6
---
	Account: {
		AccountNumber: payload.GetServiceStatusResponse.AccountNumber,
		AccountActiveIndicator: payload.GetServiceStatusResponse.AccountActiveIndicator,
		AccountConnectDate: payload.GetServiceStatusResponse.AccountConnectDate,
		AccountDisconnectDate: payload.GetServiceStatusResponse.AccountDisconnectDate,
		RateCenter: payload.GetServiceStatusResponse.RateCenter,
		IBSOrganization1: payload.GetServiceStatusResponse.IBSOrganization1,
		IBSOrganization2: payload.GetServiceStatusResponse.IBSOrganization2,
		IBSOrganization3: payload.GetServiceStatusResponse.IBSOrganization3,
		IBSOrganization4: payload.GetServiceStatusResponse.IBSOrganization4,
		StandardOrganizationKey: payload.GetServiceStatusResponse.StandardOrganizationKey,
		ClearwireCustomerId: payload.GetServiceStatusResponse.ClearwireCustomerId,
		((payload.GetServiceStatusResponse.*CurrentService default []) filter ($ !='') map {
			CurrentService : {
				StatementCode: $.StatementCode,
				IBSServiceCode: $.IBSServiceCode,
				ServiceCategoryCode: $.ServiceCategoryCode,
				ServiceCodeDescription: $.ServiceCodeDescription,
				ServiceCodeLongDescription: $.ServiceCodeLongDescription,
				OccurrenceCode: $.OccurrenceCode,				
				ServiceIdentifier: $.ServiceIdentifier,
				ServiceRate: $.ServiceRate,
				ServiceStatus: $.ServiceStatus,
				PackageContractPrice: $.PackageContractPrice,
				PackageApplication: $.PackageApplication,
				PackageCode: $.PackageCode,
				PackageSavingsAmount: $.PackageSavingsAmount,
				ServicePaidQuantity: $.ServicePaidQuantity,
				ServiceFreeQuantity: $.ServiceFreeQuantity,
				ServiceInstallDate: $.ServiceInstallDate,
				ServiceLastChangeDate: $.ServiceLastChangeDate,				
				AddressableServiceFlag: $.AddressableServiceFlag,
				SoftDisconnectFlag: $.SoftDisconnectFlag,
				TelephoneNumber: $.TelephoneNumber,
				BillCode: $.BillCode,
				ForceOccurrence: $.ForceOccurrence,
				NatureOfService: $.NatureOfService,
				HierarchyLevel: $.HierarchyLevel,
				ShortDescription: $.ShortDescription,
				LongDescription: $.LongDescription,
				CodeType: $.CodeType,
				(Campaign:  {
					CampaignRate: $.Campaign.CampaignRate,
					CampaignActive: $.Campaign.CampaignActive,
					(($.Campaign.*CampaignDetails default []) filter ($ !='') map {
						CampaignDetails : {
							CampaignDescription: $.CampaignDescription,
							CampaignFromDate: $.CampaignFromDate,
							CampaignToDate: $.CampaignToDate,
							CampaignCode: $.CampaignCode
							}
						})
					}) when $.Campaign != null,
					(CodeAttributeValues: {
						(($.CodeAttributeValues.*CodeAttribute default []) filter ($!='') map {
							CodeAttribute: $
						})
					}) when $.CodeAttributeValues != null,
				(($.*StandardServiceValues default []) filter ($!='') map {
					StandardServiceValues: {
						StandardCode: $.StandardCode,
						StandardCodeDescription: $.StandardCodeDescription,
						StandardCodeKey: $.StandardCodeKey,
						StandardType: $.StandardType,
						StandardTypeDescription: $.StandardTypeDescription,
						StandardLOB: $.StandardLOB,
						StandardLOBDescription: $.StandardLOBDescription,
						StandardLOBPercent: $.StandardLOBPercent,
						(StandardCodeAttributeValues: {
							(($.StandardCodeAttributeValues.*StandardCodeAttribute default []) filter ($!='') map {
							StandardCodeAttribute: $
							})
						}) when $.StandardCodeAttributeValues != null
					}	
				})
			}}),
			((payload.GetServiceStatusResponse.*Equipment default []) filter ($ !='') map {
				Equipment: {
					SerialNumber: $.SerialNumber,
					EquipmentType: $.EquipmentType,
					EquipmentDescription: $.EquipmentDescription,
					EquipmentStatus: $.EquipmentStatus,
					ReferenceId: $.ReferenceId,
					EquipmentMake: $.EquipmentMake,
					EquipmentModel: $.EquipmentModel,
					EquipmentModelDescription: $.EquipmentModelDescription,
					EquipmentOwnership: $.EquipmentOwnership,
					EquipmentCode: $.EquipmentCode,
					EquipmentInstallDate: $.EquipmentInstallDate,
					MobileDeviceNumber: $.MobileDeviceNumber,
					ElectronicSerialNumber: $.ElectronicSerialNumber,
					MobileStationId: $.MobileStationId,
					MasterSubsidyLock: $.MasterSubsidyLock,
					CarrierServingArea: $.CarrierServingArea,
					Nai1Xrtt: $.Nai1Xrtt,
					NaiEvdo: $.NaiEvdo,
					NaiWiMax: $.NaiWiMax,
					WholeSaleRatePlan3G: $.WholeSaleRatePlan3G,
					WholeSaleRatePlan4G: $.WholeSaleRatePlan4G,
					SMSAlertLine: $.SMSAlertLine,																									
					IntegratedVoiceMailLine: $.IntegratedVoiceMailLine,
					ReplacementMACAddress: $.ReplacementMACAddress,
					ReplacementMasterSubsidyLock: $.ReplacementMasterSubsidyLock,
					ReplacementElectronicSerialNumber: $.ReplacementElectronicSerialNumber,
					ReplacementModel: $.ReplacementModel,
					ReplacementModelDescription: $.ReplacementModelDescription,
					ReplacementShipDate: $.ReplacementShipDate,
					PPUAddress1: $.PPUAddress1,
					PPUAddress2: $.PPUAddress2,
					PPUCity: $.PPUCity,
					PPUState: $.PPUState,
					PPUZip: $.PPUZip,
					(($.*StandardEquipmentValues default []) filter ($ !='') map {
						StandardEquipmentValues : {
							StandardCode: $.StandardCode,
							StandardCodeDescription: $.StandardCodeDescription,
							StandardType: $.StandardType,
							StandardTypeDescription: $.StandardTypeDescription,
							DigitalCapable: $.DigitalCapable,
							DVR: $.DVR,
							HDTVCapable: $.HDTVCapable,
							HSDCapable: $.HSDCapable,
							DigitalPhoneCapable: $.DigitalPhoneCapable,
							MDSCapable: $.MDSCapable
						}
					}),
					(($.*Component default []) filter ($ !='') map {
						Component : {
							MACAddress: $.MACAddress,
							EquipmentCategoryDescription: $.EquipmentCategoryDescription,
							EquipmentOccurrenceNumber: $.EquipmentOccurrenceNumber,
							EquipmentComponentCode: $.EquipmentComponentCode,
							EquipmentPort: $.EquipmentPort,
							EquipmentPortType: $.EquipmentPortType,
							EquipmentRatingCode: $.EquipmentRatingCode,
							(($.*StandardPortTypeValues default []) filter ($ !='') map {
								StandardPortTypeValues: {
									StandardCode: $.StandardCode,
									StandardCodeDescription: $.StandardCodeDescription
								}
							}),
							(EquipmentServiceList : {
								(($.EquipmentServiceList.*EquipmentService default []) filter ($ !='') map {
									EquipmentService: {
										ServiceIdentifier: $.ServiceIdentifier,
										EquipmentServiceCode: $.EquipmentServiceCode
										}
								})
							}) when $.EquipmentServiceList != null
							
						}
					})
				}
			})
	} when payload.GetServiceStatusResponse != "" otherwise {}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for p createOLI (mapping/transformation, filtering, XML handling)
output:
%dw 2.0

fun checkBandwidth(characteristicObj, field) = if(!isEmpty(characteristicObj)) 
													if(field == 'speed') 
														(if(characteristicObj.value[0][0]>999) (characteristicObj[0].value[0]/1000) else characteristicObj[0].value[0]) 
													else 
														(if(characteristicObj.value[0][0]>999) ("Gbps") else "Mbps") 
											   else null
											   
fun findMRCNRCUnitPrice(itemPrice) = (itemPrice filter ((item, index) -> item.priceType == "RC" or item.priceType == "NRC")).price[0].valueExcludingTax

fun findMRCNRCTotalPrice(itemPrice) = (itemPrice filter ((item, index) -> item.priceType == "RC" or item.priceType == "NRC")).price[0].valueSubTotalPriceExcludingTax

fun getPriceAlterationTypes(item) =(item.productPrice default []) flatMap ($.priceAlteration default []) map $.priceAlterationType

fun getReplacementUnitPrice(item) = ((item.productPrice default []) flatMap ($.priceAlteration default []) filter ($.priceAlterationType == "REPLACEMENT") map (($.price.valueExcludingTax default 0) as Number))[0] default 0
										   
output application/java
---
payload map ((item, index) -> {
	"EnterpriseQuoteLineItemId__c": item.id,
    "OpportunityId": vars.oppQueryResponse.Id[0],
    "Opportunity_Service_Location__c": vars.oslId,
    "Product2Id": if(!isEmpty(item.rcProduct2Id)) item.rcProduct2Id else (vars.productBook[item.productOffering.id]),
    "Quantity": item.quantity,   
    "Is_Parent__c": if(isEmpty(item.parentProductId)) true else false,
    "Contract_Term__c": (item.characteristic filter ((item, index) -> item.businessType == "CONTRACT_TERM")).displayValue[0][0],
    "Service_Code__c": item.extendedParameters.billingServiceCode[0],
    "Exclude_from_National_Billing__c": if(isEmpty(item.extendedParameters.billingServiceCode)) true else false,
    "Service_Code_Old__c": item.extendedParameters.billingServiceCode[0],
    "Order_Type__c": "No Change",
    "Product_Family__c": if(!isEmpty((item.characteristic filter ((item, index) -> item.businessType == "PRODUCT_FAMILY")).value[0][0])) (item.characteristic filter ((item, index) -> item.businessType == "PRODUCT_FAMILY")).value[0][0] else item.productFamily.name, 	
    "Product_line_Name__c": if(!isEmpty(item.extendedParameters.contractDisplayName[0])) item.extendedParameters.contractDisplayName[0]
    						else if(!isEmpty(item.Product_line_Name_Old__c)) item.Product_line_Name_Old__c
    						else item.productOffering.name,
    "Product_line_Name_Old__c": if(!isEmpty(item.extendedParameters.contractDisplayName[0])) item.extendedParameters.contractDisplayName[0]
    						else if(!isEmpty(item.Product_line_Name_Old__c)) item.Product_line_Name_Old__c
    						else item.productOffering.name,
    "Quantity__c": item.quantity,
    "Quantity_Old__c": item.quantity,
    "Quantity_New__c": item.quantity,
    "Static_IP_Package_Size__c": (item.product.productCharacteristic filter ((item, index) -> item.name == "IPV4 Block Size")).value[0][0],
    "Parent_Name__c": (vars.cihData filter((item1,index1)->  item1.id == item.parentProductId)).productOffering.name[0],
    "ParentQuoteLineItem__c": if(!isEmpty(item.parentProductId)) ((vars.cihData filter((item1,index1)->  item1.id == item.parentProductId))[0].id) ++ "_" ++ vars.oppQueryResponse.Id[0] else null,
    "QuoteLineItemParentId__c": if(!isEmpty(item.parentProductId)) ((vars.cihData filter((item1,index1)->  item1.id == item.parentProductId))[0].id) ++ "_" ++ vars.oppQueryResponse.Id[0] else null,
    "DocumentProductName__c": item.extendedParameters.contractDisplayName[0] default item.productOffering.name,
    ("Bandwidth_Unit__c": checkBandwidth((item.characteristic filter ((item, index) -> item.businessType == "BANDWIDTH")), "unit")) if(((item.characteristic filter ((item, index) -> item.businessType == "BANDWIDTH")).value[0][0]) != "High Capacity"),   
	("Bandwidth_Speed__c": checkBandwidth((item.characteristic filter ((item, index) -> item.businessType == "BANDWIDTH")), "speed")) if(((item.characteristic filter ((item, index) -> item.businessType == "BANDWIDTH")).value[0][0]) != "High Capacity"),
	//("QuoteDiscount__c": ((item.productPrice filter((item1,index1) -> !isEmpty(item1.priceAlteration)))..valueBasePriceExcludingTax[0] as Number) - (((item.productPrice filter((item1,index1) -> !isEmpty(item1.priceAlteration)))..priceAlteration..valueExcludingTax[0]) as Number)) if(item.productPrice..priceAlteration[0][0].priceAlterationType == "REPLACEMENT"), 
	"QuoteTechnicalServiceCode__c": item.extendedParameters.technicalServiceCode[0],
	"Quote_Technical_Service_Code_old__c": item.extendedParameters.technicalServiceCode joinBy ",",
	"QuoteOneTimeOfferingMrcNrc__c": item.isOneTimeOffering,
	"National_Opportunity__c": true,
	"QuoteTotalAmount__c": if (getPriceAlterationTypes(item) contains "REPLACEMENT") ((getReplacementUnitPrice(item)) * item.quantity) else findMRCNRCTotalPrice(item.productPrice) default 0,
	("QuoteMRC__C":  if (getPriceAlterationTypes(item) contains "REPLACEMENT") ((getReplacementUnitPrice(item)) * item.quantity) else findMRCNRCTotalPrice(item.productPrice) default 0) if(item.productPrice.priceType contains "RC"),
	("QuoteNRC__c": if (getPriceAlterationTypes(item) contains "REPLACEMENT") ((getReplacementUnitPrice(item)) * item.quantity) else findMRCNRCTotalPrice(item.productPrice) default 0) if(item.productPrice.priceType contains "NRC"),
	("Is_Fee__c": false) if(item.productPrice.priceType contains "RC"),
	("Is_Fee__c": true) if(item.productPrice.priceType contains "NRC"),
	"UnitPrice__c": if (getPriceAlterationTypes(item) contains "REPLACEMENT") (getReplacementUnitPrice(item)) else findMRCNRCUnitPrice(item.productPrice) default 0,
	"UnitPrice_Old__c": if (getPriceAlterationTypes(item) contains "REPLACEMENT") (getReplacementUnitPrice(item)) else findMRCNRCUnitPrice(item.productPrice) default 0,
	"Retail_Price__c": if (getPriceAlterationTypes(item) contains "REPLACEMENT") (getReplacementUnitPrice(item)) else findMRCNRCUnitPrice(item.productPrice) default 0,
	"Offer_Retail_Price__c": if (getPriceAlterationTypes(item) contains "REPLACEMENT") (getReplacementUnitPrice(item)) else findMRCNRCUnitPrice(item.productPrice) default 0,
	("Discount_Type__c": if(item.productPrice[0].priceType == "NRC") Mule::p('salesforce.nrcDiscountType') else if(item.productPrice[0].priceType == "RC") Mule::p('salesforce.rcDiscountType') else "") if((item.productPrice[0].priceType == "NRC" or item.productPrice[0].priceType == "RC") and item.productPrice..valueExcludingTax[0] < 0),
	"QuoteLineItem_ExternalId__c" : if((item.productFamily.name contains "RingCentral") and (!isEmpty(item.rcProduct2Id))) 
			item.id ++ "_" ++ vars.oppQueryResponse.Id[0] ++ "_" ++ item.rcProduct2Id
		else item.id ++ "_" ++ vars.oppQueryResponse.Id[0],
	("Service_Category_Code__c": item.extendedParameters.icomsServiceCategoryId[0]) if(!isEmpty(item.extendedParameters.icomsServiceCategoryId[0])),
	("isHidden__c": item.extendedParameters.isHidden[0] as Boolean) if(!isEmpty(item.extendedParameters.isHidden[0])),
	("Filter_from_MACD_Transactions__c": true) if(!isEmpty(item.extendedParameters.isHidden[0]) and ((item.extendedParameters.isHidden[0] as Boolean) == true)),
	("Service_Occurance__c" : item.extendedParameters.icomsOccurrenceId[0]) if(item.extendedParameters.icomsOccurrenceId[0] != "0"),
	"Secondary_Service_Code__c" : item.secondaryServiceCode,
    "Tertiary_Service_Code__c":  item.tertiatryServiceCode,
    "Display_This_Child_in_the_SalesUI__c": true,
    "CPQCircuitId__c": (item.characteristic filter ((item, index) -> item.businessType == "CIRCUIT_ID"))[0].value[0],
    "IsBss__c": true
})

instruction: The **SFDC List View Maintenance Application** automates the governance and synchronization of Salesforce ListView definitions across the Charter/Spec using DataWeave Transform, HTTP Listener with API endpoint /${api.name}/api/${api.version}/console/*
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd">
    <flow name="sfdc-list-view-maintenance-app-main">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook custom functions (mapping/transformation, XML handling)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Custom Functions
 * Category: Advanced Patterns
 * Difficulty: Advanced
 * Description: Define reusable custom functions with `fun` and lambda
 * expressions. Functions help eliminate repetition, improve readability,
 * and encapsulate complex logic. DataWeave supports named functions,
 * lambdas, default parameters, overloading, and higher-order functions.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "products": [
 *     {
 *       "name": "Laptop Pro",
 *       "price": 1299.99
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "name": "Standing Desk",
 *       "price": 799
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "name": "Wireless Mouse",
 *       "price": 29.99
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "name": "Office Chair",
 *       "price": 449
 *     }
 *   ],
 *   "taxRate": 0.0875,
 *   "freeShippingThreshold": 100
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * [
 * {"name": "Laptop Pro", "basePrice": 1299.99, "tax": 113.75, "shipping": 0.00, "totalPrice": 1413.74},
 * {"name": "Standing Desk", "basePrice": 799.00, "tax": 69.91, "shipping": 0.00, "totalPrice": 868.91},
 * {"name": "Wireless Mouse", "basePrice": 29.99, "tax": 2.62, "shipping": 5.99, "totalPrice": 38.60},
 * {"name": "Office Chair", "basePrice": 449.00, "tax": 39.29, "shipping": 0.00, "totalPrice": 488.29}
 * ]
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
fun roundTo(num: Number, places: Number): Number = (num * pow(10, places) as Number) / pow(10, places)
fun pow(base: Number, exp: Number): Number = if (exp <= 0) 1 else base * pow(base, exp - 1)
fun applyDiscount(price: Number, discountFn: (Number) -> Number): Number = discountFn(price)
var discount = (p: Number) -> if (p > 500) p * 0.9 else p
---
payload.products map (p) -> ({
  name: p.name,
  originalPrice: p.price,
  discounted: roundTo(applyDiscount(p.price, discount), 2),
  tax: roundTo(applyDiscount(p.price, discount) * payload.taxRate, 2),
  freeShipping: p.price >= payload.freeShippingThreshold
})

instruction: Create a Mule 4 flow named 'deleteFlow' using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule 
	xmlns:validation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/validation"
	xmlns:salesforce="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce"
	xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" 
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" 
	xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" 
	xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" 
	xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core 
		http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
		http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core 
		http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd
		http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce 
		http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd
		http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/validation 
		http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/validation/current/mule-validation.xsd">
		
	<flow 
		name="deleteFlow">
		
		<logger 
			level="INFO" 
			doc:name="start" 
			message="#["Delete customer customerId=" ++ attributes.uriParams.'customerId']"
			category="app"/>
		
		<ee:transform 
			doc:name="get customerId" >
			<ee:variables >
				<ee:set-variable 
					variableName="customerId" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
attributes.uriParams.'customerId']]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		
		<salesforce:delete 
			doc:name="Delete" 
			config-ref="GlobalSalesforceConfig" >
			<salesforce:ids ><![CDATA[#[[vars.customerId]]]]></salesforce:ids>
		</salesforce:delete>
		
		<choice doc:name="Choice">
			<when expression="#[payload.successful]">
				<logger
					level="DEBUG"
					doc:name="Logger" 
					message="The customer was deleted" 
					category="app"/>
				<ee:transform doc:name="Success Message">
			<ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
  message: "${messages.record-delete-success}"
}
]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
			</when>
			<otherwise >
				<logger 
					level="DEBUG" 
					doc:name="Logger" 
					message="The customer couldn't be deleted" 
					category="app"/>
					
				<ee:transform doc:name="Response">
					<ee:message >
						<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
  message: "${messages.record-delete-error}"
}
]]></ee:set-payload>
					</ee:message>
					<ee:variables >
						<ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus" ><![CDATA[400]]></ee:set-variable>
					</ee:variables>
				</ee:transform>
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
		
		<error-handler ref="global-error-handler" />
	</flow>
</mule>

Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook ErrorHandler (mapping/transformation, filtering, XML handling)
output:
%dw 2.0

/**
 * Module: ErrorHandler
 * Version: 1.0.0
 *
 * Reusable error handling utility functions for DataWeave 2.x.
 * Provides standardized error response builders for REST and SOAP APIs,
 * error classification, retry detection, sanitization, and correlation.
 *
 * Import with: import modules::ErrorHandler
 *
 * Functions (10):
 *   buildErrorResponse, classifyError, isRetryable, errorToLog,
 *   sanitizeError, wrapWithCorrelation, httpStatusFromError, buildFaultResponse,
 *   toRFC7807, errorChain
 */

/**
 * Build a standardized JSON error response.
 * buildErrorResponse(400, "Bad Request", "Field 'email' is required")
 *   -> {error: {code: 400, message: "Bad Request", detail: "Field 'email' is required", timestamp: "..."}}
 */
fun buildErrorResponse(code: Number, msg: String, detail: String): Object =
    {
        error: {
            code: code,
            message: msg,
            detail: detail,
            timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"}
        }
    }

/**
 * Classify a Mule error object into a category string.
 * Expects the standard Mule error structure with errorType.identifier or description.
 *
 * Categories: VALIDATION, AUTHENTICATION, AUTHORIZATION, NOT_FOUND,
 *             TIMEOUT, CONNECTIVITY, TRANSFORMATION, SYSTEM
 *
 * classifyError({errorType: {identifier: "HTTP:UNAUTHORIZED"}}) -> "AUTHENTICATION"
 */
fun classifyError(error: Object): String =
    do {
        var errorId = upper(error.errorType.identifier default error.errorType default "")
        ---
        if (errorId contains "VALIDATION" or errorId contains "BAD_REQUEST" or errorId contains "EXPRESSION")
            "VALIDATION"
        else if (errorId contains "UNAUTHORIZED" or errorId contains "UNAUTHENTICATED")
            "AUTHENTICATION"
        else if (errorId contains "FORBIDDEN" or errorId contains "ACCESS_DENIED")
            "AUTHORIZATION"
        else if (errorId contains "NOT_FOUND")
            "NOT_FOUND"
        else if (errorId contains "TIMEOUT")
            "TIMEOUT"
        else if (errorId contains "CONNECTIVITY" or errorId contains "CONNECTION_REFUSED" or errorId contains "RETRY_EXHAUSTED")
            "CONNECTIVITY"
        else if (errorId contains "TRANSFORMATION" or errorId contains "MAPPING")
            "TRANSFORMATION"
        else
            "SYSTEM"
    }

/**
 * Determine if an error is transient and worth retrying.
 * Retryable: TIMEOUT, CONNECTIVITY, 429, 502, 503, 504.
 *
 * isRetryable({errorType: {identifier: "HTTP:TIMEOUT"}}) -> true
 * isRetryable({errorType: {identifier: "HTTP:UNAUTHORIZED"}}) -> false
 */
fun isRetryable(error: Object): Boolean =
    do {
        var errorId = upper(error.errorType.identifier default error.errorType default "")
        var statusCode = error.exception.statusCode default error.statusCode default 0
        ---
        (errorId contains "TIMEOUT")
        or (errorId contains "CONNECTIVITY")
        or (errorId contains "RETRY_EXHAUSTED")
        or (errorId contains "CONNECTION_REFUSED")
        or (statusCode == 429)
        or (statusCode == 502)
        or (statusCode == 503)
        or (statusCode == 504)
    }

/**
 * Convert an error object to a sanitized single-line log string.
 * Strips stack traces and sensitive fields, keeps essentials.
 *
 * errorToLog({errorType: {identifier: "HTTP:NOT_FOUND"}, description: "Resource missing"})
 *   -> "ERROR [HTTP:NOT_FOUND] Resource missing"
 */
fun errorToLog(error: Object): String =
    do {
        var errorId = error.errorType.identifier default error.errorType default "UNKNOWN"
        var desc = error.description default error.message default "No description"
        ---
        "ERROR [$(errorId)] $(desc)"
    }

/**
 * Remove sensitive data from an error payload before returning to clients.
 * Strips: stackTrace, exception, cause, internalMessage, childErrors.
 *
 * sanitizeError({message: "Not found", stackTrace: "...", exception: {...}})
 *   -> {message: "Not found"}
 */
fun sanitizeError(error: Object): Object =
    error filterObject ((val, key) ->
        !(["stackTrace", "exception", "cause", "internalMessage", "childErrors", "muleMessage"]
          contains (key as String))
    )

/**
 * Wrap an error object with a correlation ID for distributed tracing.
 *
 * wrapWithCorrelation({error: {code: 500}}, "abc-123")
 *   -> {correlationId: "abc-123", error: {code: 500}}
 */
fun wrapWithCorrelation(error: Object, correlationId: String): Object =
    {correlationId: correlationId} ++ error

/**
 * Map an error classification to an HTTP status code.
 *
 * httpStatusFromError("VALIDATION") -> 400
 * httpStatusFromError("AUTHENTICATION") -> 401
 * httpStatusFromError("NOT_FOUND") -> 404
 */
fun httpStatusFromError(errorType: String): Number =
    do {
        var statusMap = {
            "VALIDATION": 400,
            "AUTHENTICATION": 401,
            "AUTHORIZATION": 403,
            "NOT_FOUND": 404,
            "TIMEOUT": 408,
            "CONNECTIVITY": 503,
            "TRANSFORMATION": 500,
            "SYSTEM": 500
        }
        ---
        statusMap[errorType] default 500
    }

/**
 * Build a SOAP fault response structure.
 *
 * buildFaultResponse("Server", "Internal processing error")
 *   -> {Fault: {faultcode: "Server", faultstring: "Internal processing error", detail: {timestamp: "..."}}}
 */
fun buildFaultResponse(code: String, msg: String): Object =
    {
        Fault: {
            faultcode: code,
            faultstring: msg,
            detail: {
                timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"}
            }
        }
    }

/**
 * Build a full RFC 7807 Problem Details response with optional extensions.
 * toRFC7807(404, "Not Found", "Customer CUST-001 not found", "/api/customers/CUST-001", "urn:error:customer-not-found")
 */
fun toRFC7807(status: Number, title: String, detail: String, instance: String = "", typeUri: String = "about:blank"): Object =
    {
        "type": typeUri,
        title: title,
        status: status,
        detail: detail,
        (instance: instance) if !isEmpty(instance),
        timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"}
    }

/**
 * Build a causal error chain from a Mule error with nested causes.
 * Traverses error.cause recursively to produce a flat array of error descriptions.
 *
 * errorChain({description: "HTTP 500", cause: {description: "Connection refused", cause: {description: "Timeout"}}})
 *   -> ["HTTP 500", "Connection refused", "Timeout"]
 */
fun errorChain(error: Object): Array<String> =
    do {
        var desc = error.description default error.message default "Unknown error"
        var hasCause = error.cause != null and error.cause is Object
        ---
        if (hasCause)
            [desc] ++ errorChain(error.cause as Object)
        else
            [desc]
    }

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook string to date
output:
/**
 * Pattern: String to Date Conversion
 * Category: Type Coercion
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Parse date strings into proper Date/DateTime/LocalDateTime types
 * using format patterns. Essential when ingesting dates from APIs, databases,
 * or files that represent dates as strings in various formats (ISO 8601,
 * US format, European format, custom enterprise formats).
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "isoDate": "2025-03-15",
 *   "usFormat": "03/15/2025",
 *   "europeanFormat": "15.03.2025",
 *   "customFormat": "15-Mar-2025 02:30 PM",
 *   "sapFormat": "20250315",
 *   "epochMillis": "1710460800000"
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "fromISO": "2026-02-15",
 * "fromISODateTime": "2026-02-15T14:30:00Z",
 * "fromUS": "2026-02-15",
 * "fromEuropean": "2026-02-15",
 * "fromCustom": "2026-02-15T14:30:00",
 * "fromSAP": "2026-02-15",
 * "allAsISO": "2026-02-15T14:30:00Z"
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{fromISO: payload.isoDate as Date, fromUS: payload.usFormat as Date {format: "MM/dd/yyyy"}, fromEuropean: payload.europeanFormat as Date {format: "dd.MM.yyyy"}, fromSAP: payload.sapFormat as Date {format: "yyyyMMdd"}}

				Number_of_Students_Absent__c,
				Number_of_Students_Present__c,
				Number_of_Team_Seasons__c,
				Partnership__c,

				Schedule__c,
				School_Site__c,
				SCORES_Program_Coordinator__r.Name,
				SCORES_Program_Manager__r.Name,
				Season_End_Date__c,
				Season_Start_Date__c,
				Season__c,

				Team__c,

				Total_Number_of_Sessions__c,

				Team__r.Name,
				Season__r.Name,
				Team__r.School_Site__r.Region__c 
			FROM 
				Team_Season__c 
			WHERE 
				Season__r.Id = ':seasonId'
			ORDER BY 
				Season_End_Date__c DESC
			]]>
					</salesforce:salesforce-query>
					<salesforce:parameters>
						<![CDATA[#[output application/java
					---
					{
						seasonId : vars.seasonId as String,
					}
				]]]>
					</salesforce:parameters>
				</salesforce:query>
			</when>
			<otherwise>
				<salesforce:query doc:name="Query" doc:id="09cc2d2c-6b43-49fe-96e1-534e448b7af8" config-ref="Salesforce_Config">
					<salesforce:salesforce-query>
						<![CDATA[
			SELECT 
				Anticipated_Players_Enrollment__c,
				Coach_Soccer__c,
				Coach_Writing__c,
				Season__r.Id,
				CreatedById,
				CreatedDate,
				Date_Last_Session_Attended__c,
				Id,
				IsDeleted,
				LastActivityDate,
				LastModifiedById,
				LastModifiedDate,
				LastReferencedDate,
				LastViewedDate,
				Name,
				Number_of_Attendance_Completed__c,
				Number_of_Attendance_Incomplete__c,
				Number_of_Students_Absent__c,
				Number_of_Students_Present__c,
				Number_of_Team_Seasons__c,
				Partnership__c,
				Percent_of_Attendance_Completed__c,
				Percent_of_Students_Present__c,
				Schedule__c,

				SCORES_Program_Coordinator__r.Name,

				Season_End_Date__c,

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook type introspection (mapping/transformation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Runtime Type Checking and Introspection
 * Category: Advanced Patterns
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Use dw::core::Types to inspect value types at runtime for
 * dynamic transformations. Build generic processors that handle mixed-type
 * inputs, auto-detect payload formats, and apply type-specific logic
 * without hardcoding assumptions.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "fields": [
 *     {
 *       "key": "name",
 *       "value": "Alice"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "key": "age",
 *       "value": 30
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "key": "active",
 *       "value": true
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "key": "tags",
 *       "value": [
 *         "admin",
 *         "editor"
 *       ]
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "key": "address",
 *       "value": {
 *         "city": "Portland"
 *       }
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "key": "score",
 *       "value": null
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "schema": [
 * {"key": "name", "type": "String", "nullable": false, "example": "Alice Chen"},
 * {"key": "age", "type": "Number", "nullable": false, "example": 30},
 * {"key": "active", "type": "Boolean", "nullable": false, "example": true},
 * {"key": "tags", "type": "Array", "nullable": false, "itemCount": 2},
 * {"key": "address", "type": "Object", "nullable": false, "fieldCount": 2},
 * {"key": "score", "type": "Null", "nullable": true, "example": null}
 * ]
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
fun describeType(value) =
  if (value is String) "String"
  else if (value is Number) "Number"
  else if (value is Boolean) "Boolean"
  else if (value is Array) "Array"
  else if (value is Object) "Object"
  else if (value is Null) "Null"
  else "Unknown"
---

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: p integration error
output:
%dw 2.0
import * from dw::core::Strings
output application/java
fun extracterrorMessage(err) =
    if (!isEmpty(err.errorMessage.error.reason)) 
        err.errorMessage.error.reason
    else if (err.errorMessage.error is Object and !isEmpty(err.errorMessage.error.message)) 
        err.errorMessage.error.message
    else if (err.errorMessage.error is Object and !isEmpty(err.errorMessage.error.error)) 
        err.errorMessage.error.error
    else if (!isEmpty(err.description)) 
        err.description
    else if (!isEmpty(err.cause.localizedMessage)) 
        err.cause.localizedMessage
    else 
        err.description

---
[{
    Name: Mule::p("api.name"),
    Error_Message__c: 
        if (error.suppressedErrors[0] != null) 
            extracterrorMessage(error.suppressedErrors[0])
        else 
            extracterrorMessage(error),
    
    Application__c: Mule::p("api.name"),
    Summary__c: if(vars.sitesurveyid != null)
					Mule::p('summary.siteSurvey')	
				else
					Mule::p('summary.Quote'),
	Raw_Error_Message__c: write(error, "application/java") as String,
	Payload__c: write(vars.originalPayload, "application/json") as String,
    Error_Reason__c: 
    	if(error.suppressedErrors[0] != null)
    		error.suppressedErrors[0].errorType.asString 
    	else
    		error.errorType.asString,
    Error_Source__c: 
        if ((error.suppressedErrors.errorType.asString contains "SALESFORCE") or(error.errorType.asString contains 'SALESFORCE'))
        	 "Salesforce"
        else if ((error.suppressedErrors.errorType.asString contains "HTTP") or (error.errorType.namespace contains 'HTTP'))
        	 "NetCracker"
        else "MuleSoft",
    Relevant_Object_ID__c: 
    		if(vars.sitesurveyid != null)
    			 vars.sitesurveyid
    		else
    			null,
	Relevant_Object_Type__c:
			if(vars.sitesurveyid != null)
				Mule::p('salesforce.relevantObjectType')	
			else
				null
				
}]

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for v oisParams (mapping/transformation, flattening nested data)
Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook custom separator (mapping/transformation, CSV processing)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Custom Separator (Delimiter)
 * Category: CSV Operations
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Handle CSV-like files with non-standard delimiters — tabs (TSV),
 * pipes, semicolons, or other characters. Many enterprise systems and EDI
 * formats use pipe-delimited or tab-delimited files instead of commas.
 * Configure the separator in the input/output MIME type properties.
 *
 * Input (text/plain):
 * productId|productName|category|price|inStock
 * PRD-001|Ergonomic Keyboard|Electronics|89.99|true
 * PRD-002|Standing Desk Mat|Furniture|34.50|true
 * PRD-003|USB-C Hub|Electronics|45.00|false
 * PRD-004|Monitor Arm|Furniture|129.99|true
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * [
 * {"productId": "PRD-001", "productName": "Mechanical Keyboard", "category": "Electronics", "price": 149.99, "inStock": true},
 * {"productId": "PRD-002", "productName": "Standing Desk", "category": "Furniture", "price": 799.00, "inStock": true},
 * {"productId": "PRD-003", "productName": "Noise-Canceling Headset", "category": "Electronics", "price": 299.95, "inStock": false},
 * {"productId": "PRD-004", "productName": "Ergonomic Mouse", "category": "Electronics", "price": 79.99, "inStock": true}
 * ]
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
input payload application/csv separator = "|"
---
payload map (row) -> ({
  productId: row.productId,
  productName: row.productName,
  category: row.category,
  price: row.price as Number,
  inStock: row.inStock as Boolean
})

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for p sfOliResponse (mapping/transformation, flattening nested data)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
flatten((payload default []) map (item) -> do {
    var qty = ((item.Quantity_New__c default item.Quantity) as Number) default 0
    ---
    if (qty > 0)
      (1 to qty) map {
        "Service_Code__c": item.Ntl_ICOMS_Service_Code__c,
        "Service_Occurrence__c": item.Service_Occurance__c,
        "Service_Quantity__c": "1",
        "Service_Rate__c": if (item.Is_Fee__c) item.TotalPrice as Number
        					else item.Billing_Price__c as Number,         
        "Opportunity_Line_Item__c": item.Id,
        "EnterpriseQuoteLineItemId__c": item.EnterpriseQuoteLineItemId__c,
        "Service_Request__c": item.Service_Request__c,

        // Inline null check and format only if value exists
        "Future_Bill_Date__c": 
            if (item.Service_Request__r == null or item.Service_Request__r.Future_Bill_Date__c == null) 
              null 
            else 
              (item.Service_Request__r.Future_Bill_Date__c as Date { format: "yyyy-MM-dd" }),

        "Service_Active_Date__c": 
            if (item.Service_Request__r == null or item.Service_Request__r.Service_Active_Date__c == null) 
              null 
            else 
              (item.Service_Request__r.Service_Active_Date__c as Date { format: "yyyy-MM-dd" }),

        "Actual_Install_Date__c": 
            if (item.Service_Request__r == null or item.Service_Request__r.Actual_Install_Date__c == null) 
              null 
            else 
              (item.Service_Request__r.Actual_Install_Date__c as Date { format: "yyyy-MM-dd" })
      }
    else []
})

		<ee:transform doc:name="Success"

output application/json

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: p integration error
output:
%dw 2.0
import * from dw::core::Strings
output application/java
---
[{
	Name: p("app.name"),
	Error_Message__c: if (!isEmpty(error.errorMessage.payload.reason)) 
				      error.errorMessage.payload.reason
	                  else if (error.errorMessage.payload is Object and !isEmpty(error.errorMessage.payload.message)) 
				      error.errorMessage.payload.message
					   else if (error.errorMessage.payload is Object and !isEmpty(error.errorMessage.payload.error)) 
					      error.errorMessage.payload.error
					   else if (!isEmpty(error.description)) 
					      error.description
					   else if (!isEmpty(error.cause.localizedMessage)) 
					      error.cause.localizedMessage
					   else error.description,                         
	Application__c: p("app.name"),               
	Summary__c: p("error.summary"),                  
	Raw_Error_Message__c: (write(error, "application/json") as String) withMaxSize 32767,
	Payload__c: write(vars.originalPayload, "application/json") as String,
	Error_Reason__c: error.errorType.asString,
	Error_Source__c: if (error.errorType.asString contains 'SALESFORCE')("Salesforce") 
					 else if(error.errorType.asString contains 'HTTP')("NetCracker") 
					 else("MuleSoft"),
	Service_Request__c: vars.originalPayload.serviceRequestId,
	Relevant_Object_ID__c: vars.originalPayload.serviceRequestId,
	Relevant_Object_Type__c: Mule::p('salesforce.relevantObjectType')				 
}]

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook retry backoff config (XML handling)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Retry with Backoff Config
 * Category: Error Handling
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Build retry policy configuration in DataWeave for
 * transient error recovery. Calculate exponential backoff delays,
 * determine if an error is retryable, and track retry state.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "error": {
 *     "type": "HTTP:TIMEOUT",
 *     "message": "Request timed out"
 *   },
 *   "retryState": {
 *     "attempt": 2,
 *     "maxRetries": 5,
 *     "baseDelayMs": 1000,
 *     "maxDelayMs": 30000
 *   }
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "shouldRetry": true,
 * "currentAttempt": 2,
 * "nextAttempt": 3,
 * "remainingRetries": 3,
 * "delayMs": 4000,
 * "delayFormatted": "4.0s",
 * "retryAfter": "2026-02-18T10:30:04Z",
 * "isRetryableError": true,
 * "reason": "HTTP:TIMEOUT is a transient error"
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var retryableErrors = ["HTTP:TIMEOUT","HTTP:CONNECTIVITY","HTTP:SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE"]
var attempt = payload.retryState.attempt
var maxRetries = payload.retryState.maxRetries
var baseDelay = payload.retryState.baseDelayMs
var maxDelay = payload.retryState.maxDelayMs
var exponentialDelay = min([baseDelay * (2 pow attempt), maxDelay]) as Number
var isRetryable = retryableErrors contains payload.error."type"
var shouldRetry = isRetryable and (attempt < maxRetries)
---
{ shouldRetry: shouldRetry, delayMs: exponentialDelay, nextAttempt: attempt + 1, reason: payload.error."type" ++ if (shouldRetry) " is retryable" else " is not retryable" }

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shyamrajprasad dataweave fun puzzle4 (mapping/transformation, XML handling)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var mapping = {
    name : "name",
    companyName: "company.name",
    city : "company.address.city"

}

@TailRec()
fun getValue(keys:Array<String>, value) =
    if(sizeOf(keys) == 1)
        value[(keys[0])]  
    else

instruction: The **SF Enrichment Data System API (SAPI)** serves as the foundational data access layer for retrieving and updating Salesforce Service Request enric using DataWeave Transform, HTTP Listener with API endpoint /${api.name}/*
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns:salesforce="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce" xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd">
	<flow name="sf-enrichmentdata-sapi-main">
        <http:listener path="/${api.name}/*" config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" doc:name="Http listener">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <ee:transform doc:name="Get Api Version and originalPayload" doc:id="b5d333b5-b33e-4556-b679-1da39612d094">
			<ee:message />
			<ee:variables>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="version"><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
import * from dw::core::Strings
var path =attributes.maskedRequestPath
---
if((substringBefore((substringAfterLast(path,"api/")), "/")) default "" startsWith("v")) 
(substringBefore((substringAfterLast(path,"api/")), "/")) default ""
else 
""]]></ee:set-variable>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="originalPayload" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
import * from dw::core::Strings
output application/java
var path =attributes.maskedRequestPath
---
if(path as String == "/api/v1/servicerequest/update") (payload)
else
({
	"serviceRequestId" : substringAfterLast(path,'/')
})]]></ee:set-variable>
			
</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log initial request payload" doc:id="c557cca2-50cb-4d6f-ad79-66fb640f7045" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Intial request payload">
			<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[output application/json ---
{
    payload: vars.originalPayload,
    "AppReleaseVersion":p('app.releaseversion')
}]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<apikit:router config-ref="sf-enrichmentdata-sapi-config"/>
		<error-handler>
			<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="c5e6b2bb-b064-4228-9755-5a5e18610e69" >
				<error-handler-plugin:on-error doc:name="Process Error" doc:id="2eb6d514-95f6-4f01-bdf3-259330b1d481" config-ref="Error_Handler_Plugin_Config"/>
				<set-variable value="#[attributes.httpStatus]" doc:name="Set Http Status Code" doc:id="a3fa75b5-9808-49d8-b6a6-6832f25ac069" variableName="httpStatus"/>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log APIkit error response" doc:id="eb4d939f-4ff5-4705-9009-b44479e9a5b0" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Error response from APIkit router" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR"/>
			</on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="sf-enrichmentdata-sapi-console">
        <http:listener path="/${api.name}/console/*" config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:console config-ref="sf-enrichmentdata-sapi-config"/>
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Console error">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\api\v1\accounts\opportunitys\servicerequests\(serviceRequestId):sf-enrichmentdata-sapi-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="get-enrichment-data" doc:id="877ff118-7e46-4a80-a291-f4d508ce33be" name="get-enrichment-data"/>
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\api\v2\accounts\opportunitys\servicerequests\(serviceRequestId):sf-enrichmentdata-sapi-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="get-enrichment-data-v2" doc:id="43f26acf-4b84-4091-8205-ef7c23177f2e" name="get-enrichment-data-v2"/>
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\api\v1\servicerequest\(serviceRequestId):sf-enrichmentdata-sapi-config" doc:id="c8e3dfc0-2a9d-4d1f-8e2f-06ba9ab821ff">
		<flow-ref doc:name="get-sr-data" doc:id="775516e2-9c9a-4c27-8b76-8f598657452d" name="get-sr-data" />
	</flow>
	<flow name="patch:\api\v1\servicerequest\update:sf-enrichmentdata-sapi-config" doc:id="d7a77d4e-043f-41bf-b190-e871997b7624">
		<flow-ref doc:name="update-sr-data" doc:id="b4551e54-3c97-46ac-847b-d724b6243e5d" name="update-sr-data" />
	</flow>
	<flow name="get:\health-check:sf-enrichmentdata-sapi-config">
		<ee:transform doc:name="Health-Check Response" doc:id="cae4ee65-6ac1-4384-b1bb-e13c2e062333" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/health_check_response.dwl" />
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log Health-Check Response" doc:id="1a735ea1-7934-4549-b37e-15c6dd66562b" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Health-Check Response" tracePoint="END"/>
    </flow>
</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook template strings
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Template Strings (String Interpolation)
 * Category: String Operations
 * Difficulty: Beginner
 * Description: Build dynamic strings by embedding expressions inside string
 * literals using the $(...) interpolation syntax. Use for constructing log
 * messages, email bodies, API endpoint URLs, formatted display strings, and
 * any string that combines static text with dynamic values.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "order": {
 *     "orderId": "ORD-1587",
 *     "customer": "Alice Chen",
 *     "items": 3,
 *     "total": 249.97,
 *     "currency": "USD"
 *   },
 *   "config": {
 *     "apiBase": "https://api.acme.com",
 *     "version": "v2",
 *     "region": "us-west"
 *   }
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "confirmationMessage": "Thank you, Alice Chen! Your order ORD-2026-1587 with 3 items totaling $249.97 USD has been confirmed.",
 * "shippingNotice": "Order ORD-2026-1587 is scheduled for shipment on 2026-02-20.",
 * "apiEndpoint": "https://api.acme.com/v2/orders/ORD-2026-1587",
 * "logEntry": "[us-west] Processing order ORD-2026-1587 for customer Alice Chen (3 items, $249.97)"
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var o = payload.order
var c = payload.config
---
{
  confirmationMessage: "Thank you, $(o.customer)! Order $(o.orderId) with $(o.items) items totaling $(o.total) $(o.currency) confirmed.",
  apiEndpoint: "$(c.apiBase)/$(c.version)/orders/$(o.orderId)",
  logEntry: "[$(c.region)] Order $(o.orderId) for $(o.customer) ($(o.items) items)"
}

instruction: Create a Mule 4 flow named 'customerapi-main' using DataWeave Transform, HTTP Listener with API endpoint /api/*
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd ">
    <http:listener-config name="customerapi-httpListenerConfig">
        <http:listener-connection host="0.0.0.0" port="8081" />
    </http:listener-config>
    <apikit:config name="customerapi-config" api="customerapi.raml" outboundHeadersMapName="outboundHeaders" httpStatusVarName="httpStatus" />
    <flow name="customerapi-main">
        <http:listener config-ref="customerapi-httpListenerConfig" path="/api/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers>#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]</http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for remove empty function (mapping/transformation, filtering)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/json
fun removeEmpty(a: Array) = a map removeEmpty($) filter (not isEmpty($))
fun removeEmpty(o: Object) = o mapObject 
     if (isEmpty($)) {} 
     else {($$): removeEmpty($)}
fun removeEmpty(s: String) = s
---
removeEmpty(payload)

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: statusProvisionedTrunk
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
[
    {
        Id: vars.srID,
        (IOM_Stage__c:  if (vars.serviceRequest.Service_Request_IOM_Type__c == "Trunk") "Trunk Groups locked By IOM" else "Directory Listings locked By IOM") if (vars.serviceRequest.Provisioning_Status__c != "Provisioned"),        
        Provisioning_Status__c : "Provisioned", 
        (Service_Request_IOM_Type__c: "Directory Listings") if (vars.serviceRequest.Service_Request_IOM_Type__c == "Trunk" and vars.serviceRequest.Order_Contains__c =="Trunk Lines and Directory Listings"),
        (Service_Request_Version_Number__c: " ") if (vars.serviceRequest.Service_Request_IOM_Type__c == "Trunk" and vars.serviceRequest.Order_Contains__c =="Trunk Lines and Directory Listings"),
        Current_IOM_Status__c : vars.IOM_NewStatus_status 
    }
]

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook streaming large payload (mapping/transformation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Streaming Large Payloads with Deferred Output
 * Category: Performance & Optimization
 * Difficulty: Advanced
 * Description: Process payloads larger than available memory using DW 2.7-2.11
 * streaming enhancements. Combines deferred output mode, streaming-compatible
 * functions (sum, countBy, sumBy), and lazy variable materialization to handle
 * millions of records without OutOfMemory errors.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "batchId": "BATCH-001",
 *   "records": [
 *     {
 *       "id": 1,
 *       "category": "A",
 *       "amount": 100.5
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": 2,
 *       "category": "B",
 *       "amount": 250.75
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": 3,
 *       "category": "A",
 *       "amount": 75.25
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "batchId": "BATCH-20260222",
 * "totalAmount": 426.50,
 * "recordCount": 3,
 * "categoryBreakdown": {
 * "A": {"count": 2, "total": 175.75},
 * "B": {"count": 1, "total": 250.75}
 * }
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
import sumBy from dw::core::Arrays
output application/json
var totalAmount = payload.records sumBy $.amount
var grouped = payload.records groupBy $.category
---
{batchId: payload.batchId, totalAmount: totalAmount, recordCount: sizeOf(payload.records), categoryBreakdown: grouped mapObject (records, cat) -> ({(cat): {count: sizeOf(records), total: records sumBy $.amount}})}

			<http:error-response>

		<scatter-gather doc:name="Scatter-Gather" doc:id="66a1ecae-c003-418e-9bc5-defa68b8ed14">

			</ee:message>

</ee:transform>

		<error-handler>

				<set-payload value="DB failed" doc:name="Set Payload" doc:id="46c7513c-3464-42ac-8f2d-0890ceed9701" />

			</on-error-propagate>
			<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="bfb21e10-4965-4249-8bfb-39ed089e9f6f" type="APP:failed">
				<set-payload value="mysql failed" doc:name="Set Payload" doc:id="dc543ba5-56f6-4034-87e3-0caf8963f017" />
			</on-error-propagate>
			<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="a5cdcd25-d021-4960-b6f3-6b0d0ea3d3f3" type="APP:failed">
				<set-payload value="postgres failed" doc:name="Set Payload" doc:id="8ca7c797-e020-485d-beae-ee69e47f0cae" />
			</on-error-propagate>
			<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="03601460-bd69-4504-a553-d7fc8d487816" type="ANY">
				<set-payload value="response from any type of error handling scope!" doc:name="Set Payload" doc:id="c329fe91-473f-49dd-aaf9-6413fe2126b7" />
			</on-error-propagate>
		</error-handler>
	
</flow>
	<flow name="private-flow" doc:id="6f0ae07f-51b8-420b-ad04-7b346aeed244" >
		<scatter-gather doc:name="Scatter-Gather" doc:id="2fb683e2-8b7f-4187-afcd-dc565d48f105">
			<route>
				<http:request method="GET" doc:name="Genderize" doc:id="d893a724-ae82-4ef4-a810-1656d7a8aed3" url='#["https://api.genderize.io?name=" ++ vars.firstName]'>
