output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd">

    <flow name="smb-sf-ipc-spai-main">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="/${app.name}/api/${app.version}/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <logger level="INFO" doc:name="accountNumber" doc:id="8cc6c1cf-81d8-41be-8732-395cfbe10452" message="Before APIKit Router - Account Number : #[attributes.queryParams.accountNumber]"/>
		<apikit:router config-ref="smb-sf-ipc-spai-config" />
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Logger" doc:id="7268fe2d-7f6e-4f45-9f3f-6416f08756c0" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Final Response : "/>
		<error-handler >
			<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="0e57ac9e-889b-4894-aecb-d04538e55263" >
				<error-handler-plugin:on-error doc:id="1e5f8d3b-92fb-4a1d-b20c-f4a70935f0df" config-ref="Error_Handler_Plugin_Config" doc:name="Process Error" />
				<set-variable value="#[attributes.httpStatus]" doc:name="Set HTTP Status Code" doc:id="759793ad-9557-42c2-b2ad-4d8be1a0fb8a" variableName="httpStatus" />
			</on-error-propagate>
		</error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="smb-sf-ipc-spai-console">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="/${app.name}/api/${app.version}/console/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:console config-ref="smb-sf-ipc-spai-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform>
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>

    <flow name="get:\health-check:smb-sf-ipc-spai-config">
        <ee:transform>
            <ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload resource="dataweave/p-health-check-response.dwl" />
            </ee:message>
        </ee:transform>
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\ip-details:smb-sf-ipc-spai-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="ip-detailsSub_Flow" doc:id="35d1ed98-300c-483f-ba34-f88991de12f7" name="ip-detailsSub_Flow"/>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: p updateOpportunityAPIStatus wrapperCompleted
Write a DataWeave transformation for Transform Request (XML handling)
Write a DataWeave transformation for iom response (XML handling)
output:
%dw 2.0
import withMaxSize from dw::core::Strings
output application/java
var statusDetail = (vars.TAPResponse.updateStatus.newStatus.*errorInformationArray.errorMessage joinBy "") default null
var newStatus = vars.TAPResponse.updateStatus.newStatus
---
{
	IOMResponse : [
		{	 	
			Status__c: newStatus.*status[0],
			Status_Details__c: if(statusDetail != null and (sizeOf (statusDetail) < 10000)) statusDetail  else statusDetail withMaxSize 10000 default'' ,
			OrderVersion__c:  if (newStatus.sourceClientId.orderVersion != "") newStatus.sourceClientId.orderVersion else "",
				Service_request__c :  if (newStatus.equipmentSwapId !=null) (newStatus.equipmentSwapId) 
					else if ( newStatus.sourceClientId.orderNumber != null and newStatus.sourceClientId.orderNumber != "" and (sizeOf (newStatus.sourceClientId.orderNumber)) > 18)  (newStatus.sourceClientId.orderNumber withMaxSize 18)
					 else newStatus.sourceClientId.orderNumber,
			ServiceRequestVersion__c :  if (newStatus.sourceClientId != null and newStatus.sourceClientId.orderVersion != "") newStatus.sourceClientId.orderVersion else "",
			Address_ID__c :  if (newStatus.addressID != "") newStatus.addressID else "",
			Message_Type__c : "StatusUpdate",
			OrderNumber__c :  if (newStatus.serviceRequestNumber != "") newStatus.serviceRequestNumber else "",
			Validation_Status__c :  if (newStatus.validationStatus != "") newStatus.validationStatus else "",
			Supplement_Type_Text__c :  if (newStatus.sourceClientId.orderVersionReason  == "1" ) "1 – cancel an existing order"  else if (newStatus.sourceClientId.orderVersionReason  == "2") "2 - reschedule an existing order" else if (newStatus.sourceClientId.orderVersionReason == "3") "3 - alter the content of an existing order (can include a reschedule)" else if (newStatus.sourceClientId.orderVersionReason == "8") "8 - Switch only changes" else ""
		}
			
	]
	}

		<apikit:router config-ref="sf-construction-job-sapi-config" />

				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Error Response" doc:id="34564089-0b5a-4c0f-adc9-d85b25203e5a" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message=" error response" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR"/>
			</on-error-propagate>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for p upsertBSSN (mapping/transformation, filtering)
output:
%dw 2.0
import * from dw::core::Numbers
import * from dw::core::Strings

fun convertServiceStatus(billingSystemType, status) = if(billingSystemType == 'ICOMS8' or billingSystemType == 'ICOMS') (
    if(status == 'A') 'Active' 
    else if(status == 'I') 'Pending Install'
    else if(status == 'D') 'Disconnected'
    else if(status == 'N') 'Never connected'
    else 'UNKNOWN ICOMS STATUS:' ++ status
)
else if(billingSystemType == 'ACP') (
    if(status == 'A') 'Active' 
    else if(status == 'D') 'Disconnected'
    else if(status == 'I') 'Install Pending'
    else 'UNKNOWN ACP STATUS:' ++ status
) else 'UNKNOWN'

fun convertYesandNoToBoolean(addressableServiceFlag) = if(addressableServiceFlag == 'Y' or addressableServiceFlag == 'YES' or addressableServiceFlag == 'y' or addressableServiceFlag == 'yes') true else false

fun determineServiceQuantity(servicePaidQuantity,serviceFreeQuantity) = (if(servicePaidQuantity == null or servicePaidQuantity == '') 0 else servicePaidQuantity as Number) +	(if(serviceFreeQuantity == null or serviceFreeQuantity == '') 0 else serviceFreeQuantity as Number)
	
output application/java
---
payload map((item, index)-> {
	"Account__c": item.extendedParameters.sfdcServiceLocationId[0] default vars.originalPayload.sfdcServiceLocationId,
	"Addressable_Service_Flag__c": convertYesandNoToBoolean(item.extendedParameters.addressableServiceFlag[0]),
	"As_Of__c": now() as Date{format: "yyyy-MM-dd"},
	"Bill_Code__c": item.extendedParameters.billingServiceCode[0],
	"Billing_Identifier__c": item.extendedParameters.icomsOccurrenceId[0],
	"Name": "Billing Service Snapshot Item",
	"Billing_System_External_Id__c":  vars.originalPayload.divisionId ++ "-" ++ (item.extendedParameters.icomsAcctNum[0] default vars.originalPayload.icomsServiceLocationId) ++ "-" ++ (item.extendedParameters.billingSystemType[0] default "ICOMS") ++ "-" ++ ( item.extendedParameters.icomsServiceCategoryId[0]  default "D") ++ "-" ++ ( item.extendedParameters.icomsOccurrenceId[0] default "1" ) ++ "-" ++ (item.extendedParameters.billingServiceCode[0] default ""),
	"Billing_System_Type__c": "ICOMS",
	"Circuit_ID__c": (item.characteristic filter ((item, index) -> item.businessType == "CIRCUIT_ID"))[0].value[0],
	"External_Sys_Billing_Division__c": vars.originalPayload.divisionId,
	"Parent_Service_Identifier__c": item.parentProductId,
	"Service_Category_Code__c": item.extendedParameters.icomsServiceCategoryId[0],
	"Service_Code__c": item.extendedParameters.billingServiceCode[0],
	"Service_Code_Long_Description__c": item.name,
	"Service_Description__c": item.description,
	"Service_Last_Change_Date__c": if(item.modificationDate != null and item.modificationDate != "") item.modificationDate as Date else null,
	"Service_Occurance__c": item.extendedParameters.icomsOccurrenceId joinBy ",",
	"Service_Quantity__c": determineServiceQuantity(item.quantity, item.extendedParameters.serviceFreeQuantity[0]) as String,
	"Service_Rate__c": if(item.totalInstallmentAmount != null and item.totalInstallmentAmount != 0.00) item.totalInstallmentAmount
    				else if(item.productPrice[0].price.dutyFreeAmount != 0 and item.quantity > 0) round((item.productPrice[0].price.dutyFreeAmount / item.quantity) * 100) / 100 
    				else 0,
	"Service_Status__c": item.status,
	"Soft_Disconnect_Flag__c": item.extendedParameters.softDisconnectFlag[0],
	"Total_MRR__c": item.productPrice[0].price.dutyFreeAmount,
	"EnterpriseQuoteLineItemId__c": if(item.extendedParameters.masterSystem[0] == 'EOM') "" else item.id,
	(if(!isEmpty(item.extendedParameters.cpqProductReference[0]))
		{
			"fieldsToNull": ["EnterpriseQuoteLineItemId__c"],
			"Is_Fallout__c": if(!isEmpty(item.extendedParameters.cpqProductReference[0])) true else false,
			"CPQ_Product_Reference__c": item.extendedParameters.cpqProductReference[0]
	} else {
		"fieldsToNull": ["CPQ_Product_Reference__c"],
		"Is_Fallout__c": false
	})
})

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for duplicateRecordsMapping (mapping/transformation, filtering, flattening nested data)
output:
%dw 2.0
import * from dw::core::Strings
output application/json
var group  = payload groupBy ((item, index) ->  item.AccountID)
---

((flatten((group filterObject ((value, key, index) -> sizeOf(value)>1)) pluck ((value, key, index) -> value ))) orderBy ((item, index) -> item.AccountID) default []) map ((row) -> {
	"Coax_NRR_SCQR__c":row.CoaxNRRAmt replace "," with "",
	"Fiber_NRR_SCQR__c":row.FiberNRRAmt replace "," with "",
	"New_Coax_Rev_SCQR__c":row.CoaxSimpleMRRAmt replace "," with "",
	"New_Fiber_Rev_SCQR__c":row.FiberMRRAmt replace "," with "",
	"Renewal_MRR_SCQR__c":row.RenewalSoldAmt replace "," with "",
	"Renewal_MRR_Credit_SCQR__c":row.RenewalCreditAmt replace "," with "",
	"Opp_Coax_Net_Rev_NRR_Amort_Quota_SCQR__c":row.CoaxSimpleSalesCreditAmt replace "," with "",   
	"Opp_Fiber_Net_Rev_NRR_Amort_Quota_SCQR__c":row.FiberSalesCreditAmt replace "," with "",
	"Sales_Credit_Quota_Relief_SCQR__c":row.SalesCreditAmt replace "," with "",
	"Id":row.OpportunityID,
	"Last_Calculated_SCQR__c": (( ( trim(row.RecordChangedDateTime) replace " " with "T") as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T 'HH:mm:ss+HH:mm"} >> "UTC") as DateTime {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'"})
})

%dw 2.0
import * from dw::core::Numbers
import * from dw::core::Strings
import * from modules::CustomFunctions
output application/java
fun getNumber(number) = number map (
		("TeleNumber": $.telephoneNumber) if ($.primaryPhoneFlag == "Y" or $.primaryPhoneFlag == null)
)
---
payload map using ( isCampainDetailsExist =  ( $.discount != null and $.discount.discountDetails != null and ((sizeOf ($.discount.discountDetails)) > 0)  )  
	as Boolean ) {
	"Account__c": vars.sfdc.serviceLocationSfdcId,
	"Name": "Billing Service Snapshot Item",
	"Service_Code__c": $.itemCode.billerCode,
	"Service_Description__c": $.itemCodeDescription,
	"Service_Quantity__c": determineServiceQuantity($.servicePaidQuantity, $.serviceFreeQuantity) as String,
	"Install_Date__c": if ($.connectDate != null) $.connectDate as Date{format: "yyyy-MM-dd"} else null,
	"As_Of__c": now() as Date{format: "yyyy-MM-dd"},
	"Total_MRR__c": determineTotalMRR($.serviceDiscountedRate,$.servicePaidQuantity,$.status,vars.sfdc.billingSystemType),
	"Addressable_Service_Flag__c": convertYesandNoToBoolean($.addressableServiceFlag),
	"Campaign_Active__c": convertYesandNoToBoolean($.discount.discountActive),
	"Campaign_Rate__c": $.discount.discountRate,
	"Package_Contract_Price__c": $.packageContractPrice,
	"Service_Last_Change_Date__c": if ($.serviceLastChangeDate != null and $.serviceLastChangeDate != "")$.serviceLastChangeDate as Date {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"} else null,
	"Service_Status__c": convertServiceStatus(vars.sfdc.billingSystemType,$.status),
	"Service_Category_Code__c": $.lineOfBusiness.billerCode,
	"Service_Code_Long_Description__c": $.itemCodeLongDescription,
    "Service_Rate__c":determineEffectiveServiceRate(vars.sfdc.billingSystemType,$.serviceDiscountedRate,$.servicePaidQuantity,$.status),
	"Service_Occurance__c": $.serviceIdentifier,
	"Parent_Service_Identifier__c": $.parentServiceIdentifier,
	"Billing_Identifier__c": $.billingIdentifier,	
	"Billing_System_Type__c": vars.sfdc.billingSystemType,
	"External_Sys_Billing_Division__c": vars.sfdc.serviceLocationDivisionId,
	"Circuit_ID__c": $.circuitId,
	"Bill_Code__c": $.BillCode,
	"Billing_System_External_Id__c":  vars.sfdc.serviceLocationDivisionId ++ "-" ++ vars.sfdc.billingAccountNumber ++ "-" ++ vars.sfdc.billingSystemType
									++ "-" ++ ( $.lineOfBusiness.billerCode  default "" ) ++ "-" ++ ( $.serviceIdentifier default "1" ) ++ "-" ++ $.itemCode.billerCode default "",
	"Package_Application__c": $.packageApplication,
	"Package_Code__c": $.packageCode,
	"Soft_Disconnect_Flag__c": $.softDisconnectFlag,
	"Statement_Code__c": $.statementCode,
	"Telephone_Number__c": if ($.telephoneDetails != null) getNumber($.telephoneDetails).TeleNumber[0] else null,
	( "Campaign_Description__c": $.discount.discountDetails[0].discountCodeDescription ) if isCampainDetailsExist ,
	( "Campaign_From_Date__c": $.discount.discountDetails[0].discountBeginDate as Date {format: "yyyy-MM-dd" } ) if   ($.discount.discountDetails[0].discountBeginDate != null and isCampainDetailsExist) ,
	( "Campaign_To_Date__c": $.discount.discountDetails[0].discountEndDate as Date {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"} ) if ($.discount.discountDetails[0].discountEndDate != null and isCampainDetailsExist)
		
}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook attributes extraction (mapping/transformation, XML handling)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Attribute Extraction
 * Category: XML Handling
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Extract XML attributes from elements using the .@ selector.
 * XML attributes carry metadata (IDs, types, currencies, dates) on elements.
 * Understanding attribute access is critical for SOAP, HL7, EDI-XML, and
 * any schema-heavy XML integration.
 *
 * Input (application/xml):
 * <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
 * <Catalog version="2.1" lastUpdated="2025-09-10">
 *   <Product sku="SKU-1001" category="Electronics" featured="true">
 *     <Name lang="en">Wireless Mouse</Name>
 *     <Price currency="USD">29.99</Price>
 *     <Dimensions unit="cm" length="10" width="6" height="4"/>
 *   </Product>
 *   <Product sku="SKU-1002" category="Home" featured="false">
 *     <Name lang="en">Desk Lamp</Name>
 *     <Price currency="USD">45.00</Price>
 *     <Dimensions unit="cm" length="35" width="15" height="50"/>
 *   </Product>
 * </Catalog>
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "catalogVersion": "3.1",
 * "lastUpdated": "2026-02-15",
 * "products": [
 * {
 * "sku": "SKU-100",
 * "category": "electronics",
 * "featured": true,
 * "name": "Mechanical Keyboard",
 * "language": "en",
 * "price": 149.99,
 * "currency": "USD",
 * "dimensions": {"unit": "cm", "length": 45, "width": 15, "height": 4}
 * },
 * {
 * "sku": "SKU-400",
 * "category": "electronics",
 * "featured": false,
 * "name": "Wireless Mouse",
 * "language": "en",
 * "price": 29.99,
 * "currency": "USD",
 * "dimensions": {"unit": "cm", "length": 12, "width": 7, "height": 4}
 * }
 * ]
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload.Catalog.*Product map (product) -> ({sku: product.@sku, category: product.@category, featured: product.@featured as Boolean, name: product.Name, nameLang: product.Name.@lang, price: product.Price as Number, currency: product.Price.@currency, length: product.Dimensions.@length as Number, width: product.Dimensions.@width as Number, height: product.Dimensions.@height as Number, unit: product.Dimensions.@unit})

				BSNSNAME1: if ( vars.serviceRequest.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_Business_Name__c != null)
      (if ((sizeOf(vars.serviceRequest.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_Business_Name__c) default 0) > 31)
        vars.serviceRequest.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_Business_Name__c[0 to 31]
      else
        vars.serviceRequest.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_Business_Name__c default "")
    else
      (if ((sizeOf(vars.serviceRequest.Billing_Account__r.Name) default 0) > 31)
        vars.serviceRequest.Billing_Account__r.Name[0 to 31]
      else
        vars.serviceRequest.Billing_Account__r.Name default "") replace /[^ -~]/ with ("-"),
        		BSNSNAME2: (if ((sizeOf(vars.serviceRequest.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_Enduser_ID__c) default 0) > 31) vars.serviceRequest.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_Enduser_ID__c[0 to 31]
            else vars.serviceRequest.Service_Location__r.Ntl_Sales_Enduser_ID__c default "") replace /[^ -~]|[,]/ with ("-"),
				ROLLUPTOLCTN: "Y",
				TOTALLINELOCATION: "1",
				SAMELEVLSORTSQNC: "10",
				USESYSTMCMNT: "N",
				PRDCBSNSSTRC: "Y",
				STMNTPRSTRNGRPCDE: "HIGH1"				
			}			
		}
	}
}

instruction: The **Email SAPI** (System API) is a reusable email-sending service within Charter Communications' MuleSoft integration platform. It provides a centra using DataWeave Transform, HTTP Listener, Send Email with API endpoint /${app.name}/api/${app.version}/*
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns:tracing="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/tracing" xmlns:tracking="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/tracking" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:email="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/email" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/email http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/email/current/mule-email.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/tracking http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/tracking/current/mule-tracking-ee.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/tracing http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/tracing/current/mule-tracing.xsd">
   
  
	<flow name="email-sapi-main">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="/${app.name}/api/${app.version}/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Logger" doc:id="5ab2e54e-5253-4743-bfdb-022c6295ae88" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Before Sending Request to API Kit Router"/>
		<apikit:router config-ref="email-sapi-config" />
		<error-handler>
           <on-error-propagate>
				<error-handler-plugin:on-error doc:name="Process Error" doc:id="bdba4800-a509-4334-a744-c8feeba5da46" config-ref="Error_Handler_Plugin_Config" badRequestError='#["There was an issue with your request message." ++ error.description]'/>
				 <set-variable
            variableName="httpStatus" 
            value="#[attributes.httpStatus]"
            doc:name="Set HTTP Status Code" />
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="logError" doc:id="7a101eb9-2aed-41aa-98db-6d7d125cf1bf" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After Receiving Error" tracePoint="EXCEPTION"/>
           
           </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="email-sapi-console">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="/${app.name}/api/${app.version}/console/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:console config-ref="email-sapi-config" />
        <error-handler>
            <on-error-propagate type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND">
                <ee:transform>
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus">404</ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
            </on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
	<flow name="post:\emails:application\json:email-sapi-config">
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="logRequest" doc:id="8108b079-40e2-4285-81a8-0051e0918fc6" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Before Sending Request to Email Connector"/>
		<email:send doc:name="SendEmail" doc:id="170acdd9-951c-4d15-81f0-cdc1a2e30f1c" config-ref="Email_SMTP" fromAddress="${email.from}" subject="#[payload.emailContent.emailSubject]" toAddresses="#[payload.emailContent.toEmailAddress splitBy ',']">
			<email:body contentType="#[payload.emailContent.contentType]">
				<email:content ><![CDATA[#[payload.emailContent.emailBody]]]></email:content>
			</email:body>
		</email:send>
		<ee:transform doc:name="response" doc:id="bf68b988-9ffb-4fc9-b4d9-63594bec89d6" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
  "success": true,
  "apiName": p('app.name'),
  "version": p('app.version'),
  "correlationId": correlationId,
  "timestamp": now(),
  "response": "Email Sent Successfully"
}]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="logResponse" doc:id="1f04b60b-ea29-4bbe-aa76-1b786fbf3dc2" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After  Sending Request to Email Connector" tracePoint="END"/>
    </flow>
</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shyamrajprasad dataweave fun trasnformation (mapping/transformation)
Write a DataWeave transformation: v fileName
Write a DataWeave transformation: p spcRequest
Write a DataWeave transformation for expoRequest (mapping/transformation, XML handling, CSV processing)
output:
%dw 2.0
import * from dw::core::Binaries
var firstName = vars.contentVersionResult.CreatedBy.FirstName[0]
var lastName = vars.contentVersionResult.CreatedBy.LastName[0]
fun mimeType(filetype) = (filetype match {
        case "PDF" -> "application/pdf"
        case "PNG" -> "image/png"
        case "JPG" -> "image/jpeg"
        case "JPEG" -> "image/jpeg"
        case "GIF" -> "image/gif"
        case "BMP" -> "image/bmp"
        case "MP3" -> "audio/mpeg" 
        case "WAV" -> "audio/wav" 
        case "MP4" -> "video/mp4"
        case "AVI" -> "video/x-msvideo"
        case "ZIP" -> "application/zip"
        case "RAR" -> "application/x-rar-compressed"
        case "HTML" -> "text/html"
        case "DOC" -> "application/msword"
        case "DOCX" -> "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document"
        case "XLS" -> "application/vnd.ms-excel"
        case "XLSX" -> "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet"
        case "PPT" -> "application/vnd.ms-powerpoint"
        case "PPTX" -> "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation"
        case "TXT" -> "text/plain"
        case "CSV" -> "text/csv"
        case "EXCEL" -> "application/vnd.ms-excel"
        case "WORD" -> "application/msword"
        case "WORD_X" -> "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document"
        case "EXCEL_X" -> "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet"
        case "POWER_POINT_X" -> "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation"
        case "TEXT" -> "text/plain"
        case "MSG" -> "application/octet-stream"
        else -> "application/octet-stream"
        })
output application/json
---
{
	 "workOrderID": (vars.new__c.expoWorkOrderId) as String,
	 "accessMgmtQCEngineer": firstName ++ " " ++ lastName,
	 "attachments":  {
         attachment: vars.contentVersionResult map ({
             "mimeType" : mimeType(upper($.FileType)),
             "name": $.Title ++ "." ++ lower($.FileExtension),
             "content": ($.VersionData as Binary)
         } )
     }
}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: p current services request
Write a DataWeave transformation for shyamrajprasad dataweave fun reduce (aggregation)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var myVar =
{
  "a": [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5],
  "b": ["a", "b", "c", "d", "e"],
  "c": [{ "letter": "a" }, { "letter": "b" }, { "letter": "c" }],
  "d": [true, false, false, true, true]
}
---
{
  "a" : myVar.a reduce $$,
  "b": myVar.b reduce $$,
  "c": myVar.c reduce ((item, acc = "z") -> acc ++ item.letter),
  "d": myVar.c reduce $$,
  "e": myVar.d reduce ($$ and $),
  "f": myVar.d reduce ((item, acc) -> acc and item),
  "g": myVar.d reduce ((item, acc = false) -> acc and item),
  "h": myVar.d reduce $$,
  "i": myVar.a reduce ($$ + $),
  "j": myVar.a reduce ((item, acc) -> acc + item),
  "k": myVar.a reduce ((item, acc = 3) -> acc + item),
  "l": myVar.a reduce $$,
  "m": myVar.b reduce ($$ ++ $),
  "n": myVar.b reduce ((item, acc) -> acc ++ item),
  "o": myVar.b reduce ((item, acc = "z") -> acc ++ item),
  "p": myVar.b reduce $$,
  "q": myVar.c reduce ((item, acc = "z") -> acc ++ item.letter),
  "r": myVar.c reduce $$,
  "s": myVar.d reduce ($$ and $),
  "t": myVar.d reduce ((item, acc) -> acc and item),
  "u": myVar.d reduce ((item, acc = false) -> acc and item),
  "v": myVar.d reduce $$,
  "w": ([0, 1, 2, 3, 4] reduce ((item, acc = {}) -> acc ++ { a: item })) pluck $,
  "x": [] reduce $$,
  "y": [] reduce ((item,acc = 0) -> acc + item)
}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook lookup table join (mapping/transformation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Lookup Table Join
 * Category: Lookup & Enrichment
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Join a primary dataset with a reference/lookup table,
 * similar to a SQL LEFT JOIN. Common for enriching order data with
 * product details, customer records with region info, etc.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "orders": [
 *     {
 *       "orderId": "O1",
 *       "productCode": "P100",
 *       "customerId": "C1",
 *       "qty": 2
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "orderId": "O2",
 *       "productCode": "P200",
 *       "customerId": "C2",
 *       "qty": 5
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "orderId": "O3",
 *       "productCode": "P100",
 *       "customerId": "C1",
 *       "qty": 1
 *     }
 *   ],
 *   "products": [
 *     {
 *       "code": "P100",
 *       "name": "Widget",
 *       "price": 25
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "code": "P200",
 *       "name": "Gadget",
 *       "price": 50
 *     }
 *   ],
 *   "customers": [
 *     {
 *       "id": "C1",
 *       "name": "Acme Corp"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "id": "C2",
 *       "name": "Beta Inc"
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * [
 * {
 * "orderId": "ORD-001",
 * "product": { "name": "Widget Pro", "price": 29.99, "category": "Hardware" },
 * "customer": { "name": "Acme Corp", "region": "West" },
 * "qty": 3,
 * "lineTotal": 89.97
 * },
 * ...
 * ]
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
var productIndex = payload.products indexBy $.code
var customerIndex = payload.customers indexBy $.id
---
payload.orders map (order) -> do {

    var customer = customerIndex[order.customerId]
    ---

}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: p integration error
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
[{
	Name: p("app.name"),
	Error_Message__c: if (!isEmpty(error.errorMessage.payload.reason)) 
				      error.errorMessage.payload.reason
	                  else if (error.errorMessage.payload is Object and !isEmpty(error.errorMessage.payload.message)) 
				      error.errorMessage.payload.message
					   else if (error.errorMessage.payload is Object and !isEmpty(error.errorMessage.payload.error)) 
					      error.errorMessage.payload.error
					   else if (!isEmpty(error.description)) 
					      error.description
					   else if (!isEmpty(error.cause.localizedMessage)) 
					      error.cause.localizedMessage
					   else error.description,                         
	Application__c: p("app.name"),               
	Summary__c: p("error.summary"),                  
	Raw_Error_Message__c: write(vars.originalPayload, "application/java") as String,
	Error_Reason__c: error.errorType.asString,
	Error_Source__c: if (error.errorType.asString contains 'SALESFORCE')("Salesforce") 
					 else if(error.errorType.asString contains 'HTTP')("NetCracker") 
					 else("MuleSoft"),
	(Opportunity__c: vars.originalPayload.opportunityId) if(!isEmpty(vars.originalPayload.opportunityId)),
	Relevant_Object_ID__c: vars.originalPayload.opportunityId,
	Relevant_Object_Type__c: Mule::p('salesforce.relevantObjectType'),
}]

instruction: using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform, Database Select
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core"
      xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation"
      xmlns:db="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db"
      xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"
      xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
      xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
                          http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db/current/mule-db.xsd
                          http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd">

    <sub-flow name="delete-task-flow" doc:id="6e39853d-92aa-4e34-8240-93c7065323fe">
        <logger level="INFO" doc:name="Start - Delete Task" message="Starting delete task flow with ID: #[vars.taskId]"/>
        
        <!-- Check if task exists -->
        <db:select doc:name="Check Task Exists" config-ref="mysql-db-config">
            <db:sql><![CDATA[SELECT id FROM tasks WHERE id = :id]]></db:sql>
            <db:input-parameters><![CDATA[#[{
    'id': vars.taskId
}]]]></db:input-parameters>
        </db:select>
        
        <choice doc:name="Check if task exists">
            <when expression="#[isEmpty(payload)]">
                <ee:transform doc:name="Task Not Found">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
    "message": "Task not found"
}]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus"><![CDATA[404]]></ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
                <logger level="INFO" doc:name="Task Not Found" message="Task with ID #[vars.taskId] not found for deletion"/>
            </when>
            <otherwise>
                <!-- Delete task from database -->
                <db:delete doc:name="Delete Task" config-ref="mysql-db-config">
                    <db:sql><![CDATA[DELETE FROM tasks WHERE id = :id]]></db:sql>
                    <db:input-parameters><![CDATA[#[{
    'id': vars.taskId
}]]]></db:input-parameters>
                </db:delete>
                
                <!-- Set response status -->
                <ee:transform doc:name="Set No Content Status">
                    <ee:message>
                        <ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
null]]></ee:set-payload>
                    </ee:message>
                    <ee:variables>
                        <ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus"><![CDATA[204]]></ee:set-variable>
                    </ee:variables>
                </ee:transform>
                
                <logger level="INFO" doc:name="End - Delete Task" message="Completed delete task flow, deleted task with ID: #[vars.taskId]"/>
            </otherwise>
        </choice>
    </sub-flow>
    
</mule>

instruction: The **SF-Pega Service Activation Sync App** is a real-time, event-driven integration that synchronizes **Service Activation Support (SAS)** records fr using Choice Router (conditional), DataWeave Transform, HTTP Request
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:kafka="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
	xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin"
	xmlns:salesforce="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/kafka/current/mule-kafka.xsd">
	<flow name="sf-pega-serviceactivate-sync-app" doc:id="0fdd40bd-e970-4b6a-af88-43024098a030" >
						<kafka:message-listener doc:name="Consumes messages from SAS topic" doc:id="29a72957-f230-4d6e-8090-90522df2b99d" config-ref="Apache_Kafka_Consumer_configuration" ackMode="IMMEDIATE" parallelConsumersAmount="${kafka.consumers}"/>
		<set-payload value="#[payload]" doc:name="Changing Payload to JSON" doc:id="45c381fa-3ece-46e6-bea4-872ea0392b70" mimeType="application/json"/>
		<set-variable value="#[payload]" doc:name="originalPayload" doc:id="4dc9507b-2bdb-481d-a127-5c7d621d6d82" variableName="originalPayload" />
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log kafka payload" doc:id="0be66d15-16ee-4c82-8f0d-cbfee4156670" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Received Message from Service Activation Support object topic "/>
		<choice doc:name="Check payload size" doc:id="67fd7c5f-d488-426c-951b-508e6fbd0d18" >
			<when expression="#[sizeOf(payload) > 0]" >
				<flow-ref doc:name="token-flow" doc:id="17f2c299-36b7-4176-b19a-094a7f8312a7" name="token_flow" />
				<choice doc:name="Check access token is null" doc:id="f44c4991-269b-4306-b2e3-a7284fb2558c" >
					<when expression="#[vars.token.access_token != null]" >
						<http:request method="POST" doc:name="Request to pega" doc:id="33dc8063-662b-45b0-b5a6-78935e3dc7c8" config-ref="HTTP_Request_configuration-pegacloud" path="${pega.resource}" responseTimeout="${http.responsetimeout}" >
							<reconnect frequency="30000" count="3" />
							<http:headers ><![CDATA[#[output application/java
---
{
	"Authorization" : "Bearer " ++ vars.token.access_token 
}]]]></http:headers>
						</http:request>
						<json-logger:logger doc:name="Success Response" doc:id="aa649ce7-cf84-40aa-b0e5-0d0e6e98457b" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After Sending Service Activation Support Message successfully to PEGA" tracePoint="END" />
					</when>
					<otherwise >
						<ee:transform doc:name="Failure response" doc:id="c0672014-05ea-4eac-85b1-6373225bd61b" >
							<ee:message >
								<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/failure_response.dwl" />
							</ee:message>
							<ee:variables >
								<ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/java
---
p('error.badrequestcode')]]></ee:set-variable>
							</ee:variables>
						</ee:transform>
						<json-logger:logger doc:name="Failure Response" doc:id="f433eb8b-46ad-4687-a00f-7e939dd379a6" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Invalid token error message" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR" />
					</otherwise>
				</choice>
			</when>
			<otherwise >
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log the empty payload" doc:id="5835a48c-6b96-4fac-8606-fbc782655e60" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Getting Empty payload of Service Activation Support from SFDC" tracePoint="END"/>
			</otherwise>
		</choice>
		<error-handler ref="z-common-errorError_Handler"/>
</flow>
</mule>

---
{
    "success": false,
    "apiName": p('api.name'),
    "version": p('api.version'),
    "correlationId": correlationId,
    "timestamp": now(),
    "errorDetails": [
        {
            "code": (if(isEmpty(error.muleMessage.attributes.StatusCode))
                       p('error.internalservercode')
                    else
                      error.muleMessage.attributes.StatusCode),
            "reason": error.errorType.asString ,
            "message": if(error.description != null)(error.description) else (error.cause.localizedMessage)
        }
    ]
}

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook rename keys (mapping/transformation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Rename Keys
 * Category: Object Transformation
 * Difficulty: Beginner
 * Description: Rename keys in an object to match a target schema. One of the
 * most common integration tasks — mapping field names between systems (e.g.,
 * Salesforce field names to SAP field names, or snake_case API responses to
 * camelCase frontend models).
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "first_name": "Alice",
 *   "last_name": "Chen",
 *   "email_address": "alice.chen@example.com",
 *   "phone_number": "+1-555-0142",
 *   "created_at": "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z"
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * {
 * "firstName": "Alice",
 * "lastName": "Chen",
 * "emailAddress": "alice.chen@example.com",
 * "phoneNumber": "+1-555-0142",
 * "createdAt": "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z"
 * }
 */
%dw 2.0
import camelize from dw::core::Strings
output application/json
---
payload mapObject (value, key) -> ({(camelize(key as String)): value})

	<flow name="batch-job" doc:id="f80aa68c-d23e-4511-ac6b-827638e50cce" >

			<scheduling-strategy >

						<ee:message >
							<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json

instruction: Create a Mule 4 flow named 'merge-data' using DataWeave Transform, Database Select, HTTP Listener, Scatter-Gather (parallel)

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:db="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db"
	xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"
	xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd

	<http:listener-config name="HTTP_Listener_config" doc:name="HTTP Listener config" doc:id="d197b214-5391-4d39-9103-6c370b34de41" >
		<http:listener-connection host="0.0.0.0" port="8081" />
	</http:listener-config>
	<db:config name="MySQL_Database_Config" doc:name="Database Config" doc:id="bb8388ca-9756-4fde-be8d-e483d799d800" >
		<db:my-sql-connection host="${mysql.host}" port="${mysql.port}" user="${mysql.user}" password="${mysql.password}" database="${mysql.dbase}" />
	</db:config>
	<configuration-properties doc:name="Configuration properties" doc:id="40ac5f4a-8606-4160-901e-9018339d1d4b" file="config.yaml" />
	<db:config name="PostgreSQL_Database_Config" doc:name="Database Config" doc:id="c7b4bf4a-6d1f-496c-b930-f54fce3219fb" >
		<db:generic-connection url="${postgresql.url}" driverClassName="${postgresql.driver_name}" user="${postgresql.user}" password="${postgresql.password}" />
	</db:config>
	<flow name="merge-data" doc:id="ca27969f-e400-469d-8cbc-e2d8c3d9bc07">
		<http:listener doc:name="/GET" doc:id="98ad9a56-dc1c-4802-a2fe-2af8177a9893" config-ref="HTTP_Listener_config" path="combine-data/{employeeId}" />
		<set-variable value="#[attributes.uriParams.employeeId]" doc:name="ID" doc:id="0f8e882e-15d6-455d-9a31-d5ea8018ff1e" variableName="ID" />
		<scatter-gather doc:name="Scatter-Gather" doc:id="b3a3723c-892c-4abd-9410-2cf66d66b34b">
			<route>
				<db:select doc:name="PostgreSQL" doc:id="28e41edd-db6c-4eae-8e7f-268e48797e21" config-ref="PostgreSQL_Database_Config">
					<db:sql><![CDATA[SELECT * FROM employee
WHERE empid = :empid]]></db:sql>
					<db:input-parameters><![CDATA[#[{empid: vars.ID}]]]></db:input-parameters>
				</db:select>
			</route>
			<route>
				<db:select doc:name="MySQL" doc:id="0a51a7d1-5f11-4a77-88b8-1d679de3c991" config-ref="MySQL_Database_Config">
					<db:sql><![CDATA[SELECT territoryId FROM employeeterritory
WHERE employeeId = :employeeId]]></db:sql>
					<db:input-parameters><![CDATA[#[{employeeId: vars.ID}]]]></db:input-parameters>
				</db:select>
			</route>
		</scatter-gather>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Merge/JSON" doc:id="d89b9dda-2607-4a01-b15b-4fa35c267819">
			<ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload."0".payload ++ payload."1".payload]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
	</flow>
	<flow name="first-successful" doc:id="4a7e0e5f-fc94-4fda-9787-53be26493874" >
		<http:listener doc:name="/GET" doc:id="765dbaa3-6d6f-4ae4-87d1-f8f3760f8a45" config-ref="HTTP_Listener_config" path="get-data/{employeeId}"/>
		<set-variable value="#[attributes.uriParams.employeeId]" doc:name="ID" doc:id="116ec026-a569-468e-a713-475e03082d8a" variableName="ID"/>
		<first-successful doc:name="First Successful" doc:id="d9ed34e8-1d0f-499e-bba7-b33b92405e09" >
			<route >
				<db:select doc:name="PostgreSQL" doc:id="10a74a76-8cfb-463a-9734-eb5cc96aa591" config-ref="PostgreSQL_Database_Config">
					<db:sql ><![CDATA[SELECT * FROM employee
WHERE empid = :empid]]></db:sql>
					<db:input-parameters ><![CDATA[#[{empid: vars.ID}]]]></db:input-parameters>
				</db:select>
			</route>
			<route >
				<db:select doc:name="MySQL" doc:id="8ab8e637-cdde-4289-a541-d64dfb5fbfeb" config-ref="MySQL_Database_Config">
					<db:sql ><![CDATA[SELECT * FROM employee
WHERE employeeId = :employeeId]]></db:sql>
					<db:input-parameters ><![CDATA[#[{employeeId: vars.ID}]]]></db:input-parameters>
				</db:select>
			</route>
		</first-successful>
		<ee:transform doc:name="to JSON" doc:id="d0e366dc-0c3b-4950-9517-55775cb74f68" >
			<ee:message >
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for Transform SOA Response (XML handling)
Write a DataWeave transformation: p integration error
output:
%dw 2.0
import * from dw::core::Strings
output application/java
---
[{
	Name: p("api.name"),
	Error_Message__c: if (!isEmpty(error.errorMessage.payload.reason)) 
				      error.errorMessage.payload.reason
	                  else if (error.errorMessage.payload is Object and !isEmpty(error.errorMessage.payload.message)) 
				      error.errorMessage.payload.message
					   else if (error.errorMessage.payload is Object and !isEmpty(error.errorMessage.payload.error)) 
					      error.errorMessage.payload.error
					   else if (!isEmpty(error.description)) 
					      error.description
					   else if (!isEmpty(error.cause.localizedMessage)) 
					      error.cause.localizedMessage
					   else error.description,                         
	Application__c: p("api.name"),               
	Summary__c: p("error.summary"),                  
	Raw_Error_Message__c: (write(error, "application/json") as String) withMaxSize 32767,
	Payload__c: write(vars.originalPayload, "application/json") as String,
	Error_Reason__c: error.errorType.asString,
	Error_Source__c: if (error.errorType.asString contains 'SALESFORCE')("Salesforce") 
					 else if(error.errorType.asString contains 'HTTP')("NetCracker") 
					 else("MuleSoft"),
	Relevant_Object_ID__c: vars.originalPayload.AccountId,
	Relevant_Object_Type__c: Mule::p('Object.relevantObjectType')
}]

		<apikit:router config-ref="sf-prism-cj-papi-config" />

				<set-variable value="#[attributes.httpStatus]" doc:name="Set HTTP Status Code" doc:id="0a9820dc-c3a2-44b6-bb2b-de31d7c47a0b" variableName="httpStatus"/>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="logError" doc:id="87a7f68a-0cb9-4cf2-ae4d-2ddacdaba639" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="After Receiving Error" tracePoint="EXCEPTION"/>
			</on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>

    <flow name="sf-prism-cj-papi-console">

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook string padding (mapping/transformation)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: String Padding
 * Category: String Operations
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Pad strings to a fixed width with a specified character. Common
 * when generating fixed-width flat files, formatting invoice numbers, aligning
 * columns for reports, or producing zero-padded IDs for systems that require
 * fixed-length fields (e.g., SAP, mainframes, EDI).
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "invoices": [
 *     {
 *       "number": 42,
 *       "amount": 1299.5,
 *       "department": "ENG"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "number": 1587,
 *       "amount": 85.0,
 *       "department": "MKT"
 *     },
 *     {
 *       "number": 7,
 *       "amount": 24500.75,
 *       "department": "FIN"
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * [
 * {"invoiceId": "INV-00042", "amount": "   1299.50", "department": "ENG   "},
 * {"invoiceId": "INV-01587", "amount": "     85.00", "department": "MKT   "},
 * {"invoiceId": "INV-00007", "amount": "  24500.75", "department": "FIN   "}
 * ]
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload.invoices map (inv) -> ({
  invoiceId: "INV-" ++ padLeft(inv.number as String, 5, "0"),
  amount: padLeft(inv.amount as String {format: "0.00"}, 10),
  department: padRight(inv.department, 6)
})

output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule
	xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger"

	xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core"

	xsi:schemaLocation="
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd 
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd">
	<flow name="createsite-nuwave-ipilot-account-flow"
		doc:id="1a9b20e6-8c5c-4a37-a1b0-87c99241ee8c">
		<ee:transform doc:name="construct createsite payload"
			doc:id="00923dfb-a097-490c-98d5-92fb8dc16d11">
			<ee:message>
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="createSitePayload"><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json skipNullOn="everywhere"
fun Concat(parts: Array<String>): String =
    parts filter ((item) -> item != null and item != "") joinBy " "
var streetNumber = Concat([
    vars.createSiteInput.streetNoPrefix default "",
    vars.createSiteInput.streetNo default "",
    vars.createSiteInput.streetNoSuffix default ""
])
var streetName = Concat([
    vars.createSiteInput.streetDirectionalPrefix default "",
    vars.createSiteInput.streetName default "",
    vars.createSiteInput.streetThoroughfare default "",
    vars.createSiteInput.streetDirectionalSuffix default ""
])
var siteName = trim(vars.createSiteInput.siteName)
var siteId = vars.createSiteInput.siteUniqueId
var maxLength = 100 - (sizeOf(vars.createSiteInput.siteUniqueId)) - 2
---
{
    "siteName": ((if (sizeOf(siteName) > maxLength) siteName[0 to maxLength - 4] else siteName) ++ " - SR" ++ siteId),
    "country": vars.createSiteInput.country,
    "outboundRouteName": p('dw.createSite.outboundRouteName'),
    "planType": p('dw.createSite.planType'),
    "streetNumber": streetNumber,
    "streetName": streetName,
    "city": vars.createSiteInput.city,
    "state": vars.createSiteInput.state ,
    "zip": vars.createSiteInput.zip,
}]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log Flow Info"
			doc:id="c77725bc-455b-4c90-8cf4-b8b89903d7dc"
			config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config"
			message='"logger after constructing createsite payload"'
			correlationId="#[vars.transactionid]" tracePoint="FLOW">
			<json-logger:content><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule 
output application/json 
---
vars.createSitePayload]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<ee:transform doc:name="create nuwave sapi payload"
			doc:id="5ce903e5-b6fe-4fad-b9c3-d462d42069d4">
			<ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
	"method": p('dw.createSite.method'),
	"path": p('dw.createSite.path') ++ (vars.customerId default "NA"),
	"queryParams": {
	},
	"body": vars.createSitePayload
}]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="siteName" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
	"siteName": vars.createSitePayload.siteName
}]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Before Request"
			doc:id="9fb09c02-1cc9-420f-822a-7052bd3a08ff"
			config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config"
			message='"logger after creating nuwave sapi payload for site creation"'
			tracePoint="FLOW" correlationId="#[vars.transactionid]">
			<json-logger:content><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule 
output application/json 
---
payload]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<flow-ref doc:name="Flow Refers to nuwave sapi sub flow" doc:id="aa7c6ee8-1f00-49a4-801b-d6465f64843f" name="nuwave-sapi-requester-subflow"/>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="After Request"
			doc:id="7f229df9-2659-4809-aebb-9db7dc26a027"
			config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config"
			message='"logger after invoking mule nuwave sapi after site creation"'
			tracePoint="AFTER_REQUEST" correlationId="#[vars.transactionid]">
			<json-logger:content><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule 
output application/json 
---
payload]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<ee:transform doc:name="Transform Message"
			doc:id="f50518cf-bca3-4e2c-856a-465cf2a92bd9">
			<ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
	"success": true,
	"apiName": Mule::p('api.name'),
	"version": Mule::p('api.version'),
	"correlationId": vars.transactionid,
	"timestamp": now(),
	"response": payload.response ++ vars.siteName
}]]></ee:set-payload>

	</flow>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for evaluate request (mapping/transformation)
Write a DataWeave transformation: p health check response
Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook lazy evaluation (mapping/transformation, filtering)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: Lazy Evaluation
 * Category: Performance & Optimization
 * Difficulty: Advanced
 * Description: Use DataWeave's lazy evaluation and deferred output to
 * process large payloads without loading the entire dataset into memory.
 * Critical for transformations on payloads > 10 MB.
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * [
 *   {
 *     "id": 1,
 *     "name": "alice",
 *     "status": "active",
 *     "score": 92
 *   },
 *   {
 *     "id": 2,
 *     "name": "bob",
 *     "status": "inactive",
 *     "score": 45
 *   },
 *   {
 *     "id": 3,
 *     "name": "carol",
 *     "status": "active",
 *     "score": 88
 *   },
 *   {
 *     "id": 4,
 *     "name": "dan",
 *     "status": "inactive",
 *     "score": 60
 *   },
 *   {
 *     "id": 5,
 *     "name": "eve",
 *     "status": "active",
 *     "score": 97
 *   }
 * ]
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * [
 * { "id": 1, "name": "ALICE", "score": 85 },
 * { "id": 3, "name": "CAROL", "score": 91 },
 * ...
 * ]
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload
    filter $.status == "active"
    map (item) -> ({
        id: item.id,
        name: upper(item.name),
        score: item.score
    })

,"/"),"/")

,"/"),"/")
]]></ee:set-variable>

			<try doc:name="Try" doc:id="2a62e388-083b-4f2c-bc4a-8f3655192cec" >

output application/java

"connectivity error"]]></ee:set-payload>

output application/java
---
if(!isEmpty(error.muleMessage.attributes.StatusCode)) error.muleMessage.attributes.StatusCode else p('error.connectivitycode')]]></ee:set-variable>
							</ee:variables>
						</ee:transform>
					</on-error-continue>
				</error-handler>
			</try>
		</until-successful>
		<choice doc:name="Choice" doc:id="a9352644-53ec-48d2-898a-5c7fc536cea6" >
			<when expression="#[vars.errorCode == null]">
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log response from target" doc:id="59e5154a-14a9-48d2-a2de-ecb9c3b6b832" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" tracePoint="AFTER_REQUEST" message="Response from Target" />
				<ee:transform doc:name="Response payload" doc:id="f4ea8eb4-623d-4ad1-9eda-bb7c9c9ee953">
			<ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/finalResponse.dwl" />
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log success response" doc:id="1b8a11ab-4286-497b-8eea-452dbbae7455" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Final Response" tracePoint="END" />
			</when>
			<otherwise >
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log error details" doc:id="56cff96a-7d1f-46c0-ae84-d88ea4600613" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Error Details while fetching data from target API" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR" />
			</otherwise>
		</choice>

</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for Issues Filter (mapping/transformation, filtering)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/json
import * from dw::util::Values
fun convertDate(inputDate) = (((((inputDate splitBy (" "))[0]) as Date  {format: "dd-MMM-yyyy"} as String {format:"yyyy-MM-dd"}) ++"T" ++ (inputDate splitBy (" "))[1] ) as DateTime)
 
var filterIssue = if (sizeOf(payload.issues)==1)  payload.issues[0] else if(!isEmpty(payload.issues filter ((item, index) -> item.resolvedTimestamp=="null" or item.resolvedTimestamp== null) ))
 ((payload.issues filter ((item, index) -> item.resolvedTimestamp=="null" or item.resolvedTimestamp== null))[0])  else if (!isEmpty(payload.issues filter ((item, index) -> convertDate(item.resolvedTimestamp) == ((payload.issues.resolvedTimestamp map ((item, index) ->
convertDate(item)) orderBy ($ ))[-1]))) and sizeOf((payload.issues.resolvedTimestamp map ((item, index) ->
convertDate(item)) orderBy ($)) distinctBy ($))>1 )  (payload.issues filter ((item, index) -> convertDate(item.resolvedTimestamp) == ((payload.issues.resolvedTimestamp map ((item, index) ->
convertDate(item)) orderBy ($ ))[-1])))[0]  else if (!isEmpty(payload.issues filter ((item, index) -> convertDate(item.createdTimestamp) == ((payload.issues.createdTimestamp map ((item, index) ->
convertDate(item)) orderBy ($ ))[-1]))) and sizeOf((payload.issues.createdTimestamp map ((item, index) ->
convertDate(item)) orderBy ($)) distinctBy ($))>1)  (payload.issues filter ((item, index) -> convertDate(item.createdTimestamp) == ((payload.issues.createdTimestamp map ((item, index) ->
convertDate(item)) orderBy ($ ))[-1])))[0] else   payload.issues[0]
---
payload update "issues" with [filterIssue]

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for v MAC00073 Response sequence (mapping/transformation, filtering, flattening nested data)
Write a DataWeave transformation for shakarbisetty mulesoft cookbook rest api flattening (mapping/transformation, CSV processing, flattening nested data)
output:
/**
 * Pattern: REST API Response Flattening
 * Category: Real-World Mappings
 * Difficulty: Intermediate
 * Description: Flatten a deeply nested REST API response into a flat table
 * structure suitable for database insertion, CSV export, or downstream
 * systems that require denormalized data. Common when consuming complex
 * API responses (e.g., Shopify orders, Salesforce queries, GitHub events).
 *
 * Input (application/json):
 * {
 *   "orders": [
 *     {
 *       "orderId": "ORD-1001",
 *       "orderDate": "2026-02-10",
 *       "customer": {
 *         "customerId": "C-100",
 *         "name": "Acme Corp",
 *         "address": {
 *           "city": "San Francisco",
 *           "state": "CA"
 *         }
 *       },
 *       "lineItems": [
 *         {
 *           "sku": "SKU-A",
 *           "qty": 2,
 *           "price": 29.99
 *         },
 *         {
 *           "sku": "SKU-B",
 *           "qty": 1,
 *           "price": 49.99
 *         }
 *       ]
 *     }
 *   ]
 * }
 *
 * Output (application/json):
 * [
 * {"orderId": "ORD-1001", "orderDate": "2026-02-10", "customerId": "C-100", "customerName": "Acme Corp", "city": "San Francisco", "state": "CA", "country": "US", "sku": "SKU-100", "product": "Laptop", "quantity": 2, "unitPrice": 1299.99, "lineTotal": 2599.98, "shippingMethod": "Express", "shippingCost": 25.00},
 * {"orderId": "ORD-1001", "orderDate": "2026-02-10", "customerId": "C-100", "customerName": "Acme Corp", "city": "San Francisco", "state": "CA", "country": "US", "sku": "SKU-400", "product": "Mouse", "quantity": 5, "unitPrice": 29.99, "lineTotal": 149.95, "shippingMethod": "Express", "shippingCost": 25.00},
 * {"orderId": "ORD-1002", "orderDate": "2026-02-12", "customerId": "C-200", "customerName": "Globex Inc", "city": "Austin", "state": "TX", "country": "US", "sku": "SKU-300", "product": "USB-C Hub", "quantity": 10, "unitPrice": 49.99, "lineTotal": 499.90, "shippingMethod": "Standard", "shippingCost": 0.00}
 * ]
 */
%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload.orders flatMap (order) ->
    order.lineItems map (item) -> ({
        orderId: order.orderId,
        orderDate: order.orderDate,
        customerId: order.customer.customerId,
        customerName: order.customer.name,
        city: order.customer.address.city,
        sku: item.sku,
        qty: item.qty,
        price: item.price
    })

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for p MAC0003Request (XML handling)
output:
%dw 2.0
output application/xml
var parsedAddress = vars.Parsed_Address.addressCandidateListFromGeocoder.addressCandidate
var splitCDF = (vars.CDFTranslatedValue[0] default "") splitBy "-"
---
{
	ICOMS @(ENVIRONMENT: p('default.Icoms.API.Environment'), PASSWORD: p('secure::default.Icoms.Password'), USERID: p('default.ICOMS.Username'), KEY: p('default.ICOMS.API.Key')): {
		MAC00003  :  {
			SITEID: p('default.Icoms.SiteID'),
			LOCATION: if ((parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressMain default "") != "PO BOX" ) (parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressNumber default "") else "",
			FRACTION: if((parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressMain default "") != "PO BOX") (parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressFraction default "")  else "",
			PREDIR: if((parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressMain default "") != "PO BOX") (parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressPreDirectional default "")  else "",
			STREET: if( (parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressMain default "") != "PO BOX" ) (
					if(  (sizeOf(parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressMain default "")  default 0) + (sizeOf(parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressPostThoroughfare default "") default 0) > 24 ) 
						( ( (parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressMain default "") ++ " " ++ (parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressPostThoroughfare default "") )[0 to 24] )
					else ( (parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressMain default "") ++ " " ++ (parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressPostThoroughfare default "") )
				) else (parsedAddress.address default ""),
			
			POSTDIR: if((parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressMain default "") != "PO BOX") (parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressPostDirectional default "") else "",
			APARTMNT:  if((parsedAddress.parsedAddress[0].addressMain default "") != "PO BOX") (vars.subGroupRequest.Unit default "") else "",
			CITY: parsedAddress.city,
			STATE: parsedAddress.state,
			ZIP: parsedAddress.zipCode,
			COMPANY: if (((sizeOf(splitCDF)) == 3)) (splitCDF[0] as Number) as String else "",
			DIVISION: if (((sizeOf(splitCDF)) == 3)) (splitCDF[1] as Number) as String else "",
			FRANCHISE: if (((sizeOf(splitCDF)) == 3)) (splitCDF[2] as Number) as String else "",
			DWELLING: "B",
			BILLTYPE: "C",
			TARCODE: vars.TAR_Code,
			SIGACCESS: "U",
			HEADEND: "01",
			ADDRESSABLE: "N",
			PREWIRED: "Y"
		}
	}
}

 </ee:message>

</http:request>

{

	</flow>
</mule>

output:

<mule xmlns:salesforce="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce" xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd

	<flow name="sf-contact-sapi-main">

            </http:response>

                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <json-logger:logger doc:id="413ebfc4-e349-49f4-8a39-7d0bc5a5e5b5" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Initial Request Payload" doc:name="Log initial request payload" />
		<apikit:router config-ref="sf-contact-sapi-config"/>

				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log APIkit error response" doc:id="2ea1b251-186e-44f8-a26c-5b207c8017c0" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Error details" tracePoint="EXCEPTION" priority="ERROR" />
			</on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="sf-contact-sapi-console">
        <http:listener path="/${api.name}/api/${api.version}/console/*" config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <apikit:console config-ref="sf-contact-sapi-config"/>
		<error-handler >
			<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="8150d1b9-1cb7-4512-876b-d9847ff68124" type="APIKIT:NOT_FOUND" >
				<ee:transform doc:name="Console error" doc:id="ad024148-5c4b-40a3-be4d-425fd7bdee0f" >
					<ee:message >
						<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{message: "Resource not found"}]]></ee:set-payload>
					</ee:message>
					<ee:variables >
						<ee:set-variable variableName="httpStatus" ><![CDATA[404]]></ee:set-variable>
					</ee:variables>
				</ee:transform>
			</on-error-propagate>
		</error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="patch:\contact\update:application\json:sf-contact-sapi-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="update-contact-flow" doc:id="2692881d-7499-4130-8b81-e23909348341" name="update-contact-flow" />
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\contact\view\(Id):sf-contact-sapi-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="view-contact-flow" doc:id="7810b1ae-19fb-4d03-8874-d43a12a5965c" name="view-contact-flow" />
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\health-check:sf-contact-sapi-config">

				<ee:set-payload resource="dwl/health_check_response.dwl" />
			</ee:message>

		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log Health-Check Response" doc:id="72594053-c41e-4b20-8021-c5aa6f53b90a" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Health-Check Response" tracePoint="END" />
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\contact\create:application\json:sf-contact-sapi-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="create-contact-flow" doc:id="d557f0fe-dad3-4a93-b1ec-56eea7dbbde3" name="create-contact-flow" />

</mule>

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation for p webexAlert (XML handling)
output:
%dw 2.0 import * from dw::core::Strings output application/json --- { "markdown": "ENV:" ++ upper(p('mule.env')) ++ ":ERROR:" ++ error.errorType.asString ++ "(" ++ upper(p('app.name')) ++ ")" ++ "

Error occurred in " ++ p('app.name') ++ " " ++ (if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "HTTP:UNAUTHORIZED") "while authenticating to NetCracker, below are the details." else if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "HTTP:NOT_FOUND") "while connecting to NetCracker, Resource not found, below are the details." else if ((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "HTTP:METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED") "while connecting to NetCracker, Method not allowed, below are the details." else if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "HTTP:CONNECTIVITY") "while connecting to NetCracker, below are the details." else if(((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "SALESFORCE:INVALID_INPUT") or ((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "SALESFORCE:UNAUTHORIZED")) "while authenticating to Salesforce, below are the details." else if((error.errorType.namespace ++ ":" ++ error.errorType.identifier) == "SALESFORCE:CONNECTIVITY") "while connecting to Salesforce, below are the details." else ", error didn't handled, below are the details.") ++ "

Error Details:
" ++" Correlation Id = " ++ correlationId ++ "
Application Name = " ++ p('app.name') ++ "
Time Stamp = " ++ now() ++ " UTC" ++ "
System Name = NetCracker
Request Payload= " ++ write(vars.originalPayload, "application/java") as String ++ "
Error Message = " ++ if (!isEmpty(error.errorMessage.payload.reason)) (error.errorMessage.payload.reason) else error.cause.localizedMessage ++ "" }

instruction: Write a DataWeave transformation: p successResponse

    "success": true,

    "version": p('api.version'),
    "description": "Data fetched for " ++ upper(vars.apiName) ++ lower(vars.apiVersion) ++ " SOQL",

}

instruction: The **SF DRT Carrier Quote Process API (PAPI)** is a middleware integration service that bridges Salesforce and the DRT (Design Review Tool / Gearbox) using DataWeave Transform, HTTP Listener

<mule xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd

			</on-error-propagate>
        </error-handler>
    </flow>

                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>

instruction: The **Salesforce iPilot Process API (PAPI)** is a MuleSoft integration that serves as the orchestration layer between **Salesforce** and the **NuWave  using DataWeave Transform, Error Handling
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<mule xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http"

http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd
http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd">
	<flow name="update-nuwave-ipilot-account-flow"
		doc:id="9599259a-0802-4972-ae48-7a42af0904cf">
		<ee:transform doc:name="set initialPayload"
			doc:id="6b52b614-5b80-48f5-a17c-ebf6f7707729">
			<ee:message>
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables>
				<ee:set-variable variableName="initialPayload"><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
payload]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		<ee:transform doc:name="update account payload"
			doc:id="42dd4ca3-228c-40e1-ad5c-9b1a334efd0d">
			<ee:message>
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables >
				<ee:set-variable variableName="updateAccountPayload" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
var accountInfo = vars.initialPayload.accountInfo[0]
var primaryServiceAddress = vars.initialPayload.primaryServiceAddress[0]
fun generateString(n: Number) = 
do {
  var x = ('0123456789' ++ 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ' ++ 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz')
  ---
  0 to (n-1) reduce (item, acc="") -> acc ++ x[ceil(random()*sizeOf(x))]
}
---
[
    {
        "accountType": p('dw.updateAccount.accountType'),
        "resellerId": Mule::p('account.reseller'),
        "accountInfo": {
            "companyName": accountInfo.customerName,
            "streetNumber": primaryServiceAddress.streetNumber,
            "streetName": primaryServiceAddress.streetName,
            "zipCode": primaryServiceAddress.zipCode,
            "city": primaryServiceAddress.city,
            "country": primaryServiceAddress.country,
            "state": primaryServiceAddress.state,
            "externalCustomerAccountId": accountInfo.externalCustomerAccountId
        },
        "billingInfo": {
            "firstName": accountInfo.firstName,
            "lastName": accountInfo.lastName,
            "email": accountInfo.email,
            "phone": accountInfo.phone,
            "streetNumber": primaryServiceAddress.streetNumber,
            "streetName": primaryServiceAddress.streetName,
            "zipCode": primaryServiceAddress.zipCode,
            "city": primaryServiceAddress.city,
            "country": primaryServiceAddress.country,
            "state": primaryServiceAddress.state
        },
        "technicalContactInfo": {
            "firstName": accountInfo.firstName,
            "lastName": accountInfo.lastName,
            "email": accountInfo.email,
            "phone": accountInfo.phone
        },
        "primaryServiceAddress": {
            "streetNumber": primaryServiceAddress.streetNumber,
            "streetName": primaryServiceAddress.streetName,
            "zipCode": primaryServiceAddress.zipCode,
            "city": primaryServiceAddress.city,
            "country": primaryServiceAddress.country,
            "state": primaryServiceAddress.state
        },
        "loginInformation": {
            "userName": accountInfo.email,
            "password": generateString(8),
            "firstName": accountInfo.firstName,
            "lastName": accountInfo.lastName,
            "email": accountInfo.email,
            "phoneNumber": accountInfo.phone
        },
        "modulesAccess": {
            "ENHANCED SERVICES": {
                "submodule": read(p('ESsm'), 'application/json')
            },
            "MSTEAM": {
                "type": "DR",
                "tenantId": accountInfo.vendorCredential,
                "control": "",
                "option": "2",
                "areaOfService": read(p('MSTEAMaOs'), 'application/json'),
                "submodule": read(p('MSTEAMsm'), 'application/json')
            }
        },
        "didVendor": read(p('didVendor'), 'application/json')
    }
]]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log flow Info"
			doc:id="c0379776-ae5e-4d1f-b3b5-2268481c522f"
			config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config"
			message='"logger after constructing update account payload"'
			correlationId="#[vars.transactionid]" tracePoint="FLOW">
			<json-logger:content><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule 
output application/json 
---
vars.updateAccountPayload]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<ee:transform doc:name="set request body"
			doc:id="2fb5ad85-84af-4b88-917b-3417f6931a8c">
			<ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
output application/json
---
{
    "method": p('dw.updateAccount.method'),
    "path": p('dw.updateAccount.path'),
    "queryParams": {  
    },
    "body": vars.updateAccountPayload
}]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="Before  Requester"
			doc:id="a3992fa4-e5cb-4934-9741-691c5087c60d"
			config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config"
			message='"logger before invoking mule nuwave sapi for account update"'
			correlationId="#[vars.transactionid]" tracePoint="BEFORE_REQUEST">
			<json-logger:content><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule 
output application/json 
---
payload]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<flow-ref doc:name="Flow Refers to nuwave sapi sub flow" doc:id="d870bd9b-05ba-4ea5-ae51-0faa57830568" name="nuwave-sapi-requester-subflow"/>
		<json-logger:logger doc:name="After Requester"
			doc:id="092e9ba6-ec5e-49a7-9a45-2e6ebd73c1c3"
			config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config"
			message='"logger after invoking mule nuwave sapi for account update"'
			tracePoint="AFTER_REQUEST" correlationId="#[vars.transactionid]">
			<json-logger:content><![CDATA[#[import modules::JSONLoggerModule 
output application/json 
---
payload]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<set-variable value="#[attributes.statusCode]"
			doc:name="Set http statuscode"
			doc:id="43e9995a-6f9d-4f3f-910d-3677839243a1"
			variableName="httpStatus" />
		<ee:transform doc:name="set response"
			doc:id="cf5c9b1c-49e7-4790-bb61-11bb3ef79834">
			<ee:message>
				<ee:set-payload><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
var statuscode = vars.httpStatus
output application/json
---
{
	"success": if ( statuscode ~= 200 or statuscode ~= 201 ) true else false,
	"apiName": Mule::p('api.name'),
	"version": Mule::p('api.version'),
	"correlationId": vars.transactionid,
	"timestamp": now(),
	"response": payload.response
}]]></ee:set-payload>
			</ee:message>
		</ee:transform>
	</flow>
</mule>
